subject: ABIATHAR
entry:
-1. High priest. Called AHIMELECH in 2SA  8:17; 1CH 24:3,6,31
     -And ABIMELECH 1CH 18:16
     -Son of Ahimelech 1SA 22:20
     -Escapes to David from the vengeance of Saul, who slew the priests in the City of Nob 1SA 22:20-23; with 22:6-19
     -Consults the ephod for David 1SA 22:9-12; 30:9-12
     -Associate high priest with Zadok in the reign of David 2SA  15:35; 20:25; 1KI 4:4; 1CH 15:11
     -But called AHIMELECH and father of Abiathar 2SA 8:17; 1CH 18:16
     -Loyal to David when Absalom rebelled; leaves Jerusalem with the ark of the covenant, but is directed by David to return with the ark 2SA 15:24-29
     -Helps David by sending his son from Jerusalem to David with secret information concerning the counsel of Ahithophel 2SA 15:35,36; 17:15-22; 1KI 2:26
     -Supports Adonijah's pretensions to the throne 1KI 1:7
     -Thrust out of office by Solomon 1KI 2:26,27; with 1SA 2:31-35
-2. ABIATHAR
     -See AHIMELECH
entry_id:
-1. Imam besar. Disebut AHIMELECH dalam 2SA 8:17; 1Taw 24:3,6,31
     -Dan ABIMELECH 1CH 18:16
     -Putra Ahimelekh 1SA 22:20
     -Melarikan diri ke Daud dari pembalasan Saul, yang membunuh para imam di Kota Nob 1SA 22:20-23; dengan 22:6-19
     -Konsultasikan efod untuk Daud 1SA 22:9-12; 30:9-12
     -Menghubungkan imam besar dengan Zadok pada masa pemerintahan Daud 2SA 15:35; 20:25; 1KI 4:4; 1Taw 15:11
     -Tetapi disebut AHIMELECH dan ayah Abyatar 2SA 8:17; 1Taw 18:16
     -Setia kepada Daud saat Absalom memberontak; meninggalkan Yerusalem dengan membawa tabut perjanjian, namun diarahkan oleh Daud untuk kembali dengan membawa tabut perjanjian 2SA 15:24-29
     -Membantu Daud dengan mengirimkan putranya dari Yerusalem kepada Daud dengan informasi rahasia mengenai nasihat Ahitofel 2SA 15:35,36; 17:15-22; 1KI 2:26
     -Mendukung pretensi Adonia naik takhta 1KI 1:7
     -Didorong keluar dari jabatannya oleh Sulaiman 1KI 2:26,27; dengan 1SA 2:31-35
-2. ABIATHAR
     -Lihat AHIMELEKH

subject: AHAZ
entry:
-1. King of Judah, son and successor of Jotham 2KI 15:38; 16:1; 2CH 27:9; 28:1
     -Idolatrous abominations of 2KI 16:3,4; 2CH 28:2-4,22-25
     -Kingdom of, invaded by the kings of Syria and Samaria 2KI 16:5,6; 2CH 28:5-8
     -Robs the temple to purchase aid from the king of Asia 2KI 16:7-9,17,18; 2CH 28:21
     -Visits Damascus, obtains a novel pattern of an altar, which he substitutes for the altar in the temple in Jerusalem, and otherwise perverts the forms of worship 2KI 16:10-16
     -Sundial of 2KI 20:11; ISA 38:8
     -Prophets in the reign of ISA 1:1; HOS 1:1; MIC 1:1
     -Prophecies concerning ISA 7:13-25
     -Succeeded by Hezekiah 2KI 16:20
-2. Son of Micah 1CH 8:35; 9:41,42
entry_id:
-1. Raja Yehuda, putra dan penerus Yotam 2KI 15:38; 16:1; 2Taw 27:9; 28:1
     -Kekejian berhala dalam 2KI 16:3,4; 2Taw 28:2-4,22-25
     -Kerajaan, diserang oleh raja-raja Siria dan Samaria 2KI 16:5,6; 2Taw 28:5-8
     -Merampok kuil untuk membeli bantuan dari raja Asia 2KI 16:7-9,17,18; 2CH 28:21
     -Mengunjungi Damaskus, memperoleh pola altar yang baru, yang ia gantikan dengan altar di kuil di Yerusalem, dan sebaliknya memutarbalikkan bentuk ibadah 2KI 16:10-16
     -Jam matahari 2KI 20:11; ISA 38:8
     -Nabi pada masa pemerintahan ISA 1:1; HOS 1:1; MIK 1:1
     -Nubuatan tentang ISA 7:13-25
     -Digantikan oleh Hizkia 2KI 16:20
-2. Putra Mikha 1CH 8:35; 9:41,42

subject: BEER-SHEBA
entry:
-1. The most southern city of Palestine JDG 20:1
     -Named by Abraham, who lived there GEN 21:31-33; 22:19
     -The place where Isaac lived GEN 26:23
     -Jacob went out from, toward Haran GEN 28:10
     -Sacrifices offered at, by Jacob; when journeying to Egypt GEN 46:1
     -In the inheritance of Judah JOS 15:20,28; 2SA 24:7
     -Afterward assigned to Simeon JOS 19:2,9; 1CH 4:28
     -Two sons of Samuel were judges at 1SA 8:2
     -Became a seat of idolatrous worship AMO 5:5; 8:14
-2. The well of, belonged to Abraham and Isaac GEN 21:25,26
-3. Wilderness of, Hagar miraculously sees a well in GEN 21:14-19
     -An angel fed Elijah in 1KI 19:5,7
entry_id:
-1. Kota paling selatan Palestina JDG 20:1
     -Dinamakan oleh Abraham, yang tinggal di sana KEJADIAN 21:31-33; 22:19
     -Tempat tinggal Ishak KEJADIAN 26:23
     -Yakub keluar dari, menuju Haran GEN 28:10
     -Pengorbanan dipersembahkan di, oleh Yakub; ketika bepergian ke Mesir GEN 46:1
     -Dalam warisan Yehuda JOS 15:20,28; 2SA 24:7
     -Selanjutnya ditugaskan pada Simeon JOS 19:2,9; 1Taw 4:28
     -Dua putra Samuel menjadi hakim di 1SA 8:2
     -Menjadi tempat penyembahan berhala AMO 5:5; 8:14
-2. Sumur itu milik Abraham dan Ishak GEN 21:25,26
-3. Di padang gurun, Hagar secara ajaib melihat sebuah sumur dalam KEJADIAN 21:14-19
     -Seorang malaikat memberi makan Elia dalam 1KI 19:5,7

subject: BETH-EL
entry:
-1. A city north of Jerusalem
     -The ancient city adjacent to, and finally embraced in, was called Luz JOS 18:13; JDG 1:23-26
     -Abraham estblishes an altar at GEN 12:8; 13:3,4
     -The place where Jacob saw the vision of the ladder GEN 28:10-22; 31:13; HOS 12:4
     -And builds an altar at GEN 35:1-15
     -Deborah dies at GEN 35:8
     -Conquered by Joshua JOS 8:17; with 12:16
     -Conquered by the household of Joseph JDG 1:22-26
     -Allotted to Benjamin JOS 18:13,22
     -Court of justice held at
          -By Deborah JDG 4:5
          -By Samuel 1SA 7:16
     -Tabernacle at, and called HOUSE OF GOD JDG 20:18,31; 21:2
     -Jeroboam institutes idolatrous worship at 1KI 12:25-33; 2KI 10:29
     -Idolatry at JER 48:13; AMO 4:4
     -Shalmanezer sends a priest to 2KI 17:27,28
     -Prophecies against the idolatrous altars at 1KI 13:1-6,32; 2KI 23:4,15-20; AMO 3:14
     -The school of prophets at 2KI 2:3
     -The young men of, mock Elisha 2KI 2:23,24
     -People of, return from Babylon EZR 2:28; NEH 7:32
     -Prophecies against AMO 5:5
-2. A city in the south of territory of the tribe of Judah 1SA 30:27
-3. A mountain 1SA 13:2
entry_id:
-1. Sebuah kota di utara Yerusalem
     -Kota kuno yang berdekatan, dan akhirnya tercakup di dalamnya, disebut Luz JOS 18:13; Hak 1:23-26
     -Abraham mendirikan altar di KEJA 12:8; 13:3,4
     -Tempat dimana Yakub melihat penglihatan tentang tangga KEJADIAN 28:10-22; 31:13; HOS 12:4
     -Dan membangun mezbah di KEJA 35:1-15
     -Debora meninggal pada KEJADIAN 35:8
     -Ditaklukkan oleh Yosua JOS 8:17; dengan 12:16
     -Ditaklukkan oleh rumah tangga Yusuf JDG 1:22-26
     -Dialokasikan untuk Benyamin JOS 18:13,22
     -Pengadilan diadakan di
          -Oleh Debora Hak 4:5
          -Oleh Samuel 1SA 7:16
     -Tabernakel di, dan disebut RUMAH TUHAN HAK 20:18,31; 21:2
     -Yerobeam memulai penyembahan berhala di 1KI 12:25-33; 2KI 10:29
     -Penyembahan berhala di JER 48:13; AMO 4:4
     -Shalmanezer mengutus seorang pendeta ke 2KI 17:27,28
     -Nubuatan terhadap altar penyembahan berhala di 1KI 13:1-6,32; 2KI 23:4,15-20; AMO 3:14
     -Sekolah para nabi pada 2KI 2:3
     -Para pemuda, mengejek Elisa 2KI 2:23,24
     -Orang-orang yang kembali dari Babel EZR 2:28; NEH 7:32
     -Nubuatan melawan AMO 5:5
-2. Sebuah kota di sebelah selatan wilayah suku Yehuda 1SA 30:27
-3. Sebuah gunung 1SA 13:2

subject: BETHLEHEM
entry:
-1. A city southwest of Jerusalem JDG 17:7; 19:18
     -Called EPHRATAH and EPHRATH GEN 48:7; PSA 132:6; MIC 5:2
     -And BETH-LEHEM-JUDAH JDG 17:7-9; 19:1,18; RUT 1:1; 1SA 17:12
     -Rachel dies and is buried at GEN 35:16,19; 48:7
     -The city of Boaz RUT 1:1,19; 2:4; 4
     -Taken and held by the Philistines 2SA 23:14-16
     -Jeroboam converts it into a military stronghold 2CH 11:6
     -The city of Joseph MAT 2:5,6; LUK 2:4
     -Birthplace of Jesus MIC 5:2; MAT 2; LUK 2:4,15
     -Herod murders the infants of MAT 2:16-18
-2. A town of Zebulun, six miles west of Nazareth JOS 19:15
     -Israel judged at JDG 12:10
entry_id:
-1. Sebuah kota di barat daya Yerusalem Hak 17:7; 19:18
     -Disebut EPHRATAH dan EPHRATH GEN 48:7; PSA 132:6; MIK 5:2
     -Dan BETH-LEHEM-YEHUDA Hak 17:7-9; 19:1,18; KEBIASAAN 1:1; 1SA 17:12
     -Rachel meninggal dan dikuburkan pada KEJADIAN 35:16,19; 48:7
     -Kota Boas RUT 1:1,19; 2:4; 4
     -Diambil dan dipegang oleh orang Filistin 2SA 23:14-16
     -Yerobeam mengubahnya menjadi benteng militer 2CH 11:6
     -Kota Yusuf MAT 2:5,6; Lukas 2:4
     -Tempat Kelahiran Yesus MIC 5:2; MAT 2; Lukas 2:4,15
     -Herod membunuh bayi-bayi dalam MAT 2:16-18
-2. Sebuah kota Zebulon, enam mil sebelah barat Nazaret JOS 19:15
     -Israel dihakimi berdasarkan Hak-Hak 12:10

subject: BETH-SHEMESH
entry:
-1. A priestly city of the tribe of Dan JOS 21:16; 1SA 6:15; 1CH 6:59

     -In later times transferred to the tribe of Judah 2KI 14:11
     -Mentioned in Solomon's commission districts 1KI 4:9
     -Amaziah taken prisoner at 2KI 14:11-13; 2CH 25:21-23
     -Retaken by the Philistines 2CH 28:18
     -Called BETH-SHMESH JOS 19:41
-2. A city near Jerusalem JOS 19:22
-3. A fortified city of the territory of the tribe of Naphtali JOS 19:38; JDG 1:33
-4. An idolatrous temple JER 43:13

-1. Kota imam dari suku Dan JOS 21:16; 1Sam 6:15; 1CH 6:59

     -Di kemudian hari dipindahkan ke suku Yehuda 2KI 14:11
     -Disebutkan dalam distrik komisi Salomo 1KI 4:9
     -Amazia ditawan di 2KI 14:11-13; 2Taw 25:21-23
     -Direbut kembali oleh orang Filistin 2CH 28:18
     -Disebut BETH-SHMESH YOS 19:41
-2. Sebuah kota dekat Yerusalem JOS 19:22

-4. Bait suci penyembahan berhala JER 43:13

subject: BIGOTRY
entry:
-General scriptures concerning ISA 65:5; MRK 2:16; LUK 9:49,50; 15:2; 18:9-14; ACT 10:28,45; 18:12,13
-PAUL'S ARGUMENT AGAINST ROM 3:1-23; 4:1-16,23-25
-INSTANCES OF
     -Joshua, through envy, seeking to suppress Eldad and Medad, who were prophesying NUM 11:27-29
     -Jews with regard to the Samaritans JHN 4:9,27
     -In rejecting the teachings of Jesus at Nazareth LUK 4:28
     -Falsely accusing Jesus of blasphemy JHN 5:18
     -Of being a gluttonous man and a winebibber (a wino) MAT 11:18,19
     -Of keeping company with sinners LUK 7:39; 15:2; 19:5-7
     -Of not conforming to the traditions LUK 11:38,39
     -In their treatment of the young man who was born blind, whom Jesus restored to sight JHN 9:28,29,34
     -With regard to Paul's preaching ACT 21:28,29; 22:22
     -Of the Samaritans in refusing to receive Jesus LUK 9:52,53

subject: CHIDING
entry:
-Cain chides God GEN 4:13,14
-Pharaoh chides Abraham, for calling his wife his sister GEN 12:18,19
-Abimelech chides Abraham for a like offense GEN 9:10
-Abimelech chides Isaac for similar conduct GEN 26:9,10
-Isaac and Laban chide each other GEN 31:26-42
-Jacob chides Simeon and Levi for killing Hamor and Shechem GEN 34:30
-Reuben chides his brothers for their treatment of Joseph GEN 42:22
-Israelites chide Moses and tempt God EXO 17:7
-Deborah chides Israel in her epic JDG 5:16-23
-David chides Joab for killing Abner 2SA 3:28-31
-Joab chides David for lamenting the death of Absalom 2SA 19:5-7
-Jesus chides his disciples
     -On account of their unbelief MAT 8:26; 14:31; 16:8-11; 17:17; MRK 4:40; LUK 8:25
     -For slowness of heart MAT 15:16; 16:8,9,11; MRK 7:18; LUK 24:25; JHN 14:9
     -For sleeping in Gethsemane MAT 26:40; MRK 14:27
     -For forbidding children to be brought to him MAT 19:14; MRK 10:14; LUK 18:16
entry_id:

subject: CONDESCENSION OF GOD
entry:
-In reasoning with his creatures
     -Sets forth his reasons for sending the flood GEN 6:11-13
-Enters into covenant with Abraham GEN 15:1-21; 18:1-22
-Indulges Abraham's intercession for Sodom GEN 18:23-33
-Warns Abimelech in a dream GEN 20:3-7
-Reasons with Moses EXO 4:2-17
-Sends flesh to the Israelites in consequence of their murmuring EXO 16:12
-Indulges Moses' prayer to behold his glory EXO 33:18-23
-Indulges Gideon's tests JDG 6:36-40
-Reasons with JOB JOB 38; 39; 40; 41
-Invites sinners, saying, "Come now, and let us reason together," ISA 1:18-20
-Expostulates with backsliding Israel ISA 41:21-24; 43:1-19; 65:1-16; JER 3:1-15; 4:1-31; 7:1-34; EZK 18:25-32; 33:10-20; HOS 2; MIC 6:1-9; MAL 3:7-15

-Memanjakan ujian Gideon (Hak. 6:36-40).
-Alasan dengan JOB JOB 38; 39; 40; 41
-Mengundang orang-orang berdosa sambil berkata, "Marilah kita berpikir bersama-sama," ISA 1:18-20

subject: DAVID
entry:
-1. King of Israel
     -Genealogy of RUT 4:18-22; 1SA 16:11; 17:12; 1CH 2:3-15; MAT 1:1-6; LUK 3:31-38
     -A shepherd 1SA 16:11
     -Kills a lion and a bear 1SA 17:34-36
     -Anointed king, while a youth, by the prophet Samuel, and inspired 1SA 16:1,13; PSA 89:19-37
     -Chosen of God PSA 78:70
     -Described to Saul 1SA 16:18
     -Detailed as armor-bearer and musician at Saul's court 1SA 16:21-23
     -Kills Goliath 1SA 17
     -The love of Jonathan for 1SA 18:1-4
     -Popularity and discreetness of 1SA 18
     -Saul's jealousy of 1SA 18:8-30
     -Is defrauded of Merab, and given Michal to marry 1SA 18:17-27
     -Jonathan intercedes for 1SA 19:1-7
     -Probably writes Psalms Eleven at this period of his life PSA 17; 35; 52; 58; 64; 109; 142
     -Conducts a campaign against, and defeats the Philistines 1SA 19:8
     -Saul attempts to kill him; he escapes to Ramah, and lives at Naioth, where Saul pursues him 1SA 19:9-24
     -About this time writes PSA 59
     -Returns, and Jonathan makes covenant with him 1SA 20
     -Escapes by way of Nob, where he obtains shewbread and Goliath's sword from Abimelech 1SA 21:1-6; MAT 12:3,4
     -Escapes to Gath 1SA 21:10-15
     -At this time probably writes PSA 34; 35; 52; 56; 120
     -Recruits an army of insurgents, goes to Moab, returns to Hareth 1SA 22
     -Probably writes PSA 13
     -Saves Keilah 1SA 23:1-13
     -Makes second covenant with Jonathan 1SA 23:16-18
     -Goes to the wilderness of Ziph, is betrayed to Saul 1SA 23:13-26
     -Writes a psalm on the betrayal PSA 54
     -And probably PSA 22; 31; 34; 140
     -Saul is diverted from pursuit of 1SA 23:27,28
     -At this time probably writes PSA 12; 22
     -Goes to En-gedi 1SA 23:29
     -Refrains from killing Saul 1SA 24
     -Writes PSA 57
     -Covenants with Saul 1SA 26
     -Marries Nabal's widow, Abigail, and Ahinoam 1SA 25
     -Lives in the wilderness of Ziph, has opportunity to kill Saul, but only takes his spear; Saul is contrite 1SA 26
     -Flees to Achish and lives in Ziklag 1SA 27
     -The list of men who join him 1CH 12:1-22
     -Conducts an expedition against Amalekites, misstates the facts to Achish 1SA 27:8-12
     -At this time probably writes PSA 141
     -Is refused permission to accompany the Philistines to battle against the Israelites 1SA 28:1,2; 29
     -Rescues the people of Ziklag, who had been captured by the Amalekites 1SA 30
     -Probably writes PSA 18; 20; 21
     -Death and burial of Saul and his sons 1SA 31; 2SA 21:1-14
     -Kills the murderer of Saul 2SA 1:1-16
     -Lamentation over Saul 2SA 1:17-27
     -After living for one year and four months at Ziklag 1SA 27:7
     -David goes to Hebron, and is anointed king by Judah 2SA 2:1-4,11; 5:5; 1KI 2:11; 1CH 3:4; 11:1-3
     -The list of those who join him at Hebron 1CH 12:23-40
     -Ish-bosheth, son of Saul, crowned 2SA 2:4
     -David wages war against and defeats Ish-bosheth 2SA 2:13-32; 3:4
     -Demands the restoration of Michal, his wife 2SA 3:14-16
     -Abner revolts from Ish-bosheth, and joins David, but is killed by Joab 2SA 3
     -Punishes Ish-bosheth's murderers 2SA 4
     -Anointed king over all Israel, after reigning over Judah at Hebron for seven years and six months, and reigns thirty-three years 2SA 2:11; 5:5; 1CH 3:4; 11:1-3; 12:23-40; 29:27
     -Makes conquest of Jerusalem 2SA 5:6; 1CH 11:4-8; ISA 29:1
     -Builds a palace 2SA 5:11; 2CH 2:3
     -Friendship of, with Hiram, king of Tyre 2SA 5:11; 1KI 5:1
     -Prospered of God 2SA 5:10; 1CH 11:9
     -Fame of 1CH 14:17
     -Philistines make war against, and are defeated by him 2SA 5:17,25
     -Assembles thirty-thousand men to escort the ark of the covenant to Jerusalem with music and thanksgiving 2SA 6:1-5
     -Uzzah is struck down when he attempts to steady the ark of the covenant 2SA 6:6-11
     -David is terrified, and leaves the ark at the house of Obed-edom 2SA 6:9-11
     -After three months, David brings the ark of the covenant to Jerusalem with dancing and great joy 2SA 6:12-16; 1CH 13
     -Organized the tabernacle service 1CH 9:22; 15:16-24; 16:4-6,37-43
     -Offers sacrifice, distributes gifts, and blesses the people 2SA 6:17-19
     -Michal rebukes him for his religious enthusiasm 2SA 6:20-23
     -Desires to build a temple, is forbidden, but receives God's promise that his seed should reign forever 2SA 7:12-16; 23:5; 1CH 17:11-14; 2CH 6:16; PSA 89:3,4; 132:11,12; ACT 15:16; ROM 15:12
     -Interpretation and fulfillment of this prophecy ACT 13:22,23
     -At this time, probably, David writes PSA 15; 16; 24; 101; 138
     -Conquers the Philistines, Moabites, and Syria 2SA 8
     -Treats Mephibosheth, the lame son of Saul, with great kindness 2SA 9:6; 19:24-30
     -Sends commissioners with a message of sympathy to Hanun, son of the king of Ammon; the message is misinterpreted, and commissioners treated with indignity; David retaliates by invading, and defeats the combined armies of the Ammonites and Syrians 2SA 10; 1CH 19
     -Probably writes PSA 18; 20; 21
     -Commits adultery with Bath-sheba 2SA 11:2-5
     -Wickedly causes the death of Uriah 2SA 11:6-25
     -Takes Bath-sheba to be his wife 2SA 11:26,27
     -Is rebuked by the prophet Nathan 2SA 12:1-14
     -Repents of his crime and confesses his guilt PSA 6; 32; 38; 39; 40; 51
     -Is chastised with grievous affliction on account of his crime PSA 38; 41; 69
     -Death of his infant son (born from Bath-sheba) 2SA 12:15-23
     -Solomon is born to 2SA 12:24,25
     -Ammonites defeated and tortured 2SA 12:26-31
     -Amnon's crime, his murder by Absalom, and Absalom's flight 2SA 13
     -Absalom's return 2SA 14:1-24
     -Absalom's usurpation 2SA 14; 15
     -David's flight from Jerusalem 2SA 15:13-37
     -He probably writes, at this time PSA 5; 7; 26; 61; 63; 69; 70; 86; 143
     -Shimei curses him 2SA 16
     -Crosses the Jordan River 2SA 17:21-29
     -Absalom's defeat and death 2SA 18
     -Laments the death of Absalom 2SA 18:33; 19:1-4
     -Rebuked by Joab 2SA 19:5-7
     -David rebukes the priests for not showing loyalty amid the complaints of the people against him 2SA 19:9-15
     -Shimei begs for clemency 2SA 19:16-23
     -Mephibosheth begs for the king's favor 2SA 19:24-30
     -Barzillai rewarded 2SA 19:31-40
     -Judah accused by the ten tribes of stealing him away 2SA 19:41-43
     -Returns to Jerusalem 2SA 20:1-3
     -At this time, probably, David composes PSA 27; 66; 122; 144
     -Sheba's conspiracy against David, and his death 2SA 20
     -Makes Amasa general 2SA 19:13
     -Amasa is killed 2SA 20:4-10
     -Consigns seven sons of Saul to the Gibeonites to be killed to atone for Saul's persecution of the Gibeonites 2SA 21:1-14
     -Buries Saul's bones, and the bones of his sons 2SA 21:12-14
     -Defeats the Philistines 2SA 21:15-22; 1CH 20:4-8
     -Takes the military strength of Israel without divine authority, and is reproved 2SA 24; 1CH 21; 27:24
     -Probably composes PSA 30; 131
     -Marries Abishag 1KI 1:1-4
     -Probably composes PSA 19; 111
     -Adonijah usurps the sceptre; Solomon appointed to the throne 1KI 1; 1CH 23:1
     -Delivers his charge to Solomon 1KI 2:1-11; 1CH 22:6-19; 28; 29
     -Probably composes PSA 23; 145
     -Last words of 2SA 23:1-7
     -Death of 1KI 2:10; 1CH 29:28; ACT 2:29,30
     -Sepulchre of ACT 2:29
     -Age of, at death 2SA 5:4,5; 1CH 29:28
     -Length of reign, forty years 1KI 2:11; 1CH 29:27,28
     -Wives of 2SA 3:2-5
     -Children born
          -At Hebron 2SA 3:2-5; 1CH 3:4
          -At Jerusalem 2SA 5:14-16; 1CH 3:5-8; 14:4-7
     -Descendants of 1CH 3
     -Civil and military officers of 2SA 8:16-18
     -See CABINET
     -Lists of his heroes, and of their exploits 2SA 23; 1CH 11; 12:23-40
     -Devoutness of 1SA 13:14; 2SA 6:5,14,18; 7:18-29; 8:11; 24:25; 1KI 3:14; 1CH 17:16-27; 29:10; 2CH 7:17; ZEC 12:8; PSA 6; 7; 11; 13; 17; 22; 26; 27:7-14; 28; 31; 35; 37
     -Justice in the administration of 2SA 8:15; 1CH 18:14
     -Discreetness of 1SA 18:14,30
     -Meekness of 1SA 24:7; 26:11; 2SA 16:11; 19:22,23
     -Merciful 2SA 19:23
     -David as musician 1SA 16:21-23; 1CH 15:16; 23:5; 2CH 7:6; 29:26; NEH 12:36; AMO 6:5
     -David as poet 2SA 22
     -See PSALMS OF DAVID
     -David as prophet 2SA 23:2-7; 1CH 28:19; MAT 22:41-46; ACT 2:25-38; 4:25
     -Type of Christ PSA 2; 16; 18:43; 69:7-9
     -Jesus called son of MAT 9:27; 12:23; 15:22; 20:30,31; 21:9; 22:42; MRK 10:47,48; LUK 18:37,39
     -Prophecies concerning him and his kingdom NUM 24:17,19; 2SA 7:11-16; 1CH 17:9-14; 22; 2CH 6:5-17; 13:5; 21:7; PSA 89:19-37; ISA 9:7; 16:5; 22:20-25; JER 23:5; 33:15-26; LUK 1:32,33
     -Chronicles of, written by Samuel, Nathan, and Gad 1CH 29:29,30
-2. A prophetic name for Christ JER 30:9; EZK 34:23,24; 37:24,25; HOS 3:5

subject: ELIJAH
entry:
-1. The Tishbite, a Gileadite and prophet, called ELIAS in the King James Version of the N. T.
     -Persecuted by Ahab 1KI 17:2-7; 18:7-10
     -Escapes to the wilderness, where he is miraculously fed by ravens 1KI 17:1-7
     -By divine direction goes to Zarephath, where he is sustained in the household of a widow, whose meal and oil are miraculousiy increased 1KI 17:8-16
     -Returns, and sends a message to Ahab 1KI 18:1-16
     -Meets Ahab and directs him to assemble the prophets of Baal 1KI 18:17-20
     -Derisively challenges the priests of Baal to offer sacrifices 1KI 18:25-29
     -Kills the prophets of Baal 1KI 18:40
     -Escapes to the wilderness from the fierceness of Jezebel 1KI 19:1-18
     -Fasts for forty days 1KI 19:8
     -Despondency and complaints of 1KI 19:10,14
     -Consolation given to 1KI 9:11-18
     -Flees to the wilderness of Damascus; directed to anoint Hazael king over Syria, Jehu king over Israel, and Elisha to be a prophet in his own place 1KI 19:9-21
     -Personal aspect of 2KI 1:8
     -Piety of 1KI 19:10,14; LUK 1:17; ROM 11:2; JAS 5:17
     -His translation 2KI 2:11
     -Appears to Jesus at his transfiguration MAT 17:3,4; MRK 9:4; LUK 9:30
     -Antitype of John the Baptist MAT 11:14; 16:14; 17:10-12; MRK 9:12,13; LUK 1:17; JHN 1:21-25
-MIRACLES OF
     -Increases the oil of the widow of Zarephath 1KI 17:14-16
     -Raises the son of the woman of Zarephath from the dead 1KI 17:17-24
     -Causes rain after seven years of drought 1KI 18:41-45; JAS 5:17,18
     -Causes fire to consume the sacrifice 1KI 18:24,36-38
     -Calls fire down upon the soldiers of Ahaziah 2KI 1:10-12; LUK 9:54
-PROPHECIES OF
     -Foretells a drought 1KI 17:3
     -The destruction of Ahab and his house 1KI 21:17-29; 2KI 9:25-37
     -The death of Ahaziah 2KI 1:2-17
     -The plague sent as a judgment upon the people in the time of Jehoram, king of Israel 2CH 21:12-15
-2. Also called ELIAH
     -A Benjamite chief 1CH 8:27
-3. A post-exile Jew EZR 10:21
entry_id:
-1. Orang Tishbit, seorang Gilead dan nabi, disebut ELIAS dalam Versi King James dari N. T.
     -Dianiaya oleh Ahab 1KI 17:2-7; 18:7-10
     -Melarikan diri ke hutan belantara, di mana dia secara ajaib diberi makan oleh burung gagak 1KI 17:1-7
     -Dengan arahan ilahi pergi ke Sarfat, di mana ia dihidupi dalam rumah tangga seorang janda, yang makanan dan minyaknya secara ajaib bertambah 1KI 17:8-16
     -Mengembalikan, dan mengirimkan pesan kepada Ahab 1KI 18:1-16
     -Bertemu dengan Ahab dan mengarahkannya untuk mengumpulkan para nabi Baal 1KI 18:17-20
     -Mengejek menantang para imam Baal untuk mempersembahkan kurban 1KI 18:25-29
     -Membunuh nabi Baal 1KI 18:40
     -Lolos ke padang gurun dari ganasnya Izebel 1KI 19:1-18
     -Puasa selama empat puluh hari 1KI 19:8
     -Keputusasaan dan keluhan 1KI 19:10,14
     -Penghiburan diberikan pada 1KI 9:11-18
     -Melarikan diri ke hutan belantara Damaskus; diarahkan untuk mengurapi Hazael menjadi raja Siria, Yehu menjadi raja Israel, dan Elisa menjadi nabi menggantikan dirinya sendiri 1KI 19:9-21
     -Aspek pribadi 2KI 1:8
     -Kesalehan 1KI 19:10,14; Lukas 1:17; ROMA 11:2; Yak 5:17
     -Terjemahannya 2KI 2:11
     -Muncul pada Yesus pada transfigurasinya MAT 17:3,4; Mrk 9:4; Lukas 9:30
     -Antitipe dari Yohanes Pembaptis MAT 11:14; 16:14; 17:10-12; Mrk 9:12,13; Lukas 1:17; Yohanes 1:21-25
- KEAJAIBAN DARI
     -Menambah minyak janda Sarfat 1KI 17:14-16
     -Membangkitkan anak perempuan Sarfat dari kematian 1KI 17:17-24
     -Menyebabkan hujan setelah tujuh tahun kekeringan 1KI 18:41-45; Yak 5:17,18
     -Menyebabkan api memakan korban 1KI 18:24,36-38
     -Panggilan api ke atas prajurit Ahazia 2KI 1:10-12; Lukas 9:54
-NUBUATAN
     -Meramalkan akan terjadinya kekeringan 1KI 17:3
     -Kehancuran Ahab dan rumahnya 1KI 21:17-29; 2KI 9:25-37
     -Kematian Ahazia 2KI 1:2-17
     -Tulah yang ditimpakan sebagai penghakiman atas bangsa itu pada zaman Yoram, raja Israel 2CH 21:12-15
-2. Disebut juga ELIAH
     -Seorang pemimpin suku Benyamin 1CH 8:27
-3. Seorang Yahudi pasca pengasingan EZR 10:21

subject: ELISHA
entry:
-(Successor to the prophet Elijah)
-Elijah instructed to anoint 1KI 19:16
-Called by Elijah 1KI 19:19
-Ministers unto Elijah 1KI 19:21
-Witnesses Elijah's transporting, receives a double portion of his spirit 2KI 2:1-15; 3:11
-Mocked by the young men of Beth-el 2KI 2:23,24
-Causes the king to restore the property of the hospitable Shunammite woman 2KI 8:1-6
-Instructs that Jehu be anointed as king of Israel 2KI 9:1-3
-Life of, sought by Jehoram 2KI 6:31-33
-Death of 2KI 13:14-20
-Bones of, restore a dead man to life 2KI 13:21
-MIRACLES OF
     -Divides the Jordan 2KI 2:14
     -Purifies the waters of Jericho by casting salt into the fountain 2KI 2:19-22
     -Increases the oil of the woman whose sons were to be sold for her debt 2KI 4:1-7
     -Raises the son of the Shunammite woman from the dead 2KI 4:18-37
     -Neutralizes the poison of the stew 2KI 4:38-41
     -Increases the bread to feed one-hundred men 2KI 4:42-44
     -Heals Naaman the leper 2KI 5:1-19; LUK 4:27
     -Sends Naaman's leprosy upon Gehazi as a judgment 2KI 5:26,27
     -Recovers the ax that had fallen into a stream by causing it to float 2KI 6:6
     -Reveals the counsel of the king of Syria 2KI 6:12
     -Opens the eyes of his servant to see the hosts of the Lord 2KI 6:17
     -Brings blindness upon the army of Syria 2KI 6:18
-PROPHECIES OF
     -Foretells
          -The birth of a son to the Shunammite woman 2KI 4:16
          -Bounty to the starving people in Samaria 2KI 7:1
          -The death of the unbelieving prince 2KI 7:2
          -Seven years of famine in the land of Canaan 2KI 8:1-3
          -The death of Ben-hadad, king of Syria 2KI 8:7-10
          -Elevation of Hazael to the throne 2KI 8:11-15
          -The victory of Jehoash over Syria 2KI 13:14-19
entry_id:
-(Penerus nabi Elia)
-Elia memerintahkan untuk mengurapi 1KI 19:16
-Disebut oleh Elia 1KI 19:19
-Menteri kepada Elia 1KI 19:21
-Menyaksikan perpindahan Elia, menerima dua bagian rohnya 2KI 2:1-15; 3:11
-Diejek oleh para pemuda Betel 2KI 2:23,24
-Menyebabkan raja mengembalikan harta milik wanita Sunem yang ramah 2KI 8:1-6
-Memerintahkan agar Yehu diurapi menjadi raja Israel 2KI 9:1-3
-Hidup, dicari oleh Yoram 2KI 6:31-33
-Kematian 2KI 13:14-20
-Tulang, menghidupkan kembali orang mati 2KI 13:21
- KEAJAIBAN DARI
     -Membagi Yordan 2KI 2:14
     -Mensucikan air Yerikho dengan menuangkan garam ke dalam mata air 2KI 2:19-22
     -Menambah minyak wanita yang anak laki-lakinya dijual karena hutangnya 2KI 4:1-7
     -Membangkitkan anak perempuan Sunem dari kematian 2KI 4:18-37
     -Menetralkan racun rebusan 2KI 4:38-41
     -Menambah roti untuk memberi makan seratus orang 2KI 4:42-44
     -Menyembuhkan Naaman si penderita kusta 2KI 5:1-19; Lukas 4:27
     -Mengirimkan penyakit kusta Naaman kepada Gehazi sebagai penghakiman 2KI 5:26,27
     -Memulihkan kapak yang jatuh ke sungai dengan menyebabkannya terapung 2KI 6:6
     -Mengungkapkan nasihat raja Siria 2KI 6:12
     -Membuka mata hambanya untuk melihat bala tentara Tuhan 2KI 6:17
     -Menimbulkan kebutaan bagi tentara Siria 2KI 6:18
-NUBUATAN
     -Meramalkan
          -Kelahiran seorang anak laki-laki dari perempuan Sunem 2KI 4:16
          -Bounty kepada orang kelaparan di Samaria 2KI 7:1
          -Kematian pangeran kafir 2KI 7:2
          -Tujuh tahun kelaparan di tanah Kanaan 2KI 8:1-3
          -Meninggalnya Ben-hadad, raja Siria 2KI 8:7-10
          -Peninggian Hazael naik takhta 2KI 8:11-15
          -Kemenangan Yoas atas Siria 2KI 13:14-19

     -Satan

     -Isaac, denying that Rebekah was his wife GEN 26:7-10

     -Joseph, in the deception he carried on with his brothers GEN 42; 43; 44
     -Pharaoh, in dealing deceitfully with the Israelites EXO 7; 8; 9; 10; 11; 12
     -Aaron, in attempting to shift responsibility for the making of the golden calf EXO 32:1-24
     -Rahab, in denying that the spies were in her house JOS 2:4-6
     -The Gibeonites, ambassadors, in the deception they perpetrated upon Joshua and the elders of Israel in leading them to believe that they came from a distant region, when in fact they lived in the immediate vicinity JOS 9
     -Ehud, in pretending to carry secret messages to Eglon, king of Moab, while his real objective was to assassinate him JDG 3:16-23
     -Sisera, who instructed Jael to mislead his pursuers JDG 4:20
     -Saul, in professing to Samuel to have obeyed the commandment to destroy all spoils of the Amalekites, when in fact he had not obeyed 1SA 15:1-26
     -In accusing Ahimelech of conspiring with David against himself 1SA 22:11-16
     -David lied to Ahimelech, professing to have a mission from the king, in order that he might obtain provisions and armor 1SA 21
     -David in feigning madness 1SA 21:13-15
     -David's other deceits with the Philistines 1SA 27:8-12
     -The falsehood of friendship to Absalom that David put in the mouth of Hushai 2SA 15:34-37
     -Michal, in the false statement that David was sick, in order to save him from Saul's violence 1SA 19:12-17
     -The Amalekite who claimed to have killed Saul 2SA 1:10-12
     -Hushai
          -In false professions to Absalom 2SA 16:16-19
          -In his deceitful counsel to Absalom 2SA 17:7-14
     -The wife of the Bahurimite who saved the lives of Hushai's messengers, sent to apprise David of the movements of Absalom's army 2SA 17:15-22
     -The murder, under false pretense
          -Of Adonijah 1KI 2:23
          -Of Shimei 1KI 2:42,43
          -Of Jeroboam's wife 1KI 14:2
     -The old prophet of Beth-el who misguided the prophet of Judah 1KI 13:11-22
     -Jeroboam's wife, feigning herself to be another woman 1KI 14:5-7
     -The conspirators against Naboth 1KI 21:7-13
     -Gehazi, when he ran after Naaman, and misrepresented that Elisha wanted a talent of silver and two changes of clothes 2KI 5:20-24
     -Hazael, servant of the king of Syria, lied to the king in misstating the prophet Elisha's message with regard to the king's recovery 2KI 8:7-15
     -Jehu lied to the worshipers of Baal in order to gain the advantage over them and destroy them 2KI 10:18-28
     -Zedekiah, in violating his oath of allegiance to Nebuchadnezzer 2CH 36:13; EZK 16:59; 17:15-20
     -Samaritans, in their efforts to hinder the rebuilding of the temple at Jerusalem EZR 4
     -Sanballat in trying to obstruct the rebuilding of Jerusalem NEH 6
     -Haman, in his conspiracy against the Jews EST 3:8
     -Jeremiah's adversaries, in accusing him of joining the Chaldeans JER 37:13-15
     -Princes of Israel, when they went to Jeremiah for a vision from the Lord JER 42:20
     -Herod the Great, to the wise men, in professing to desire to worship Jesus MAT 2:8
     -Jewish leaders
          -In falsely accusing Jesus of being gluttonous and a winebibber (a wino) MAT 11:19
          -In refusing to bear truthful testimony concerning John the Baptist MAT 21:24-27
          -Falsely accusing Jesus of blasphemy, when he forgave sin MAT 9:2-6; MRK 2:7; LUK 5:21
          -And when Jesus announced that he was the Son of God MAT 26:65; MRK 14:64; JHN 10:33-38
     -Peter, in denying Jesus MAT 26:69-75; MRK 14:68-71; LUK 22:56-62; JHN 18:25-27
     -The Roman soldiers, who said the disciples stole the body of Jesus MAT 28:13,15
     -The disobedient son, who promised to work in the vineyard, but did not MAT 21:30
     -Ananias and Sapphira falsely state that they had sold their land for a given sum ACT 5:1-10
     -Stephen's accusers, who falsely accused him of blaspheming Moses and God ACT 6:11-14
     -Paul's traducers, falsely accusing him of treason to Caesar ACT 16:20,21; 17:5-7; 24:5; 25:7,8
     -The Cretans are always liars, evil beasts, slow bellies TIT 1:12

subject: GIBEON
entry:
-1. A city of the Hivites JOS 9:3,17; 2SA 21:2
     -The people of, adroitly draw Joshua into a treaty JOS 9
     -Made servants by the Israelites, when their sharp practice was discovered JOS 9:27
     -The sun stands still over, during Joshua's battle with the five confederated kings JOS 10:12-14
     -Allotted to Benjamin JOS 18:25
     -Assigned to the Aaronites JOS 21:17
     -The tabernacle located at 1KI 3:4; 1CH 16:39; 21:29; 2CH 1:2,3,13
     -Smitten by David 1CH 14:16
     -Seven sons of Saul killed at, to avenge the inhabitants of 2SA 21:1-9
     -Solomon worships at, and offers sacrifices 1KI 3:4
     -Has the dream concerning righteousness 1KI 3:5; 9:2
     -Abner slays Asahel at 2SA 3:30
     -Ishmael, the son of Nethaniah, defeated at, by Johanan JER 41:11-16
-2. Pool of 2SA 2:13; JER 41:12
entry_id:
-1. Kota orang Hewi JOS 9:3,17; 2SA 21:2
     -Masyarakat dengan cerdik menarik Yosua ke dalam perjanjian JOS 9
     -Dijadikan hamba oleh orang Israel, ketika praktek tajam mereka diketahui JOS 9:27
     -Matahari berhenti di atas, selama pertempuran Yosua dengan lima raja konfederasi JOS 10:12-14
     -Dialokasikan untuk Benyamin JOS 18:25
     -Ditugaskan kepada kaum Harun JOS 21:17
     -Tabernakel terletak di 1KI 3:4; 1Taw 16:39; 21:29; 2CH 1:2,3,13
     -Dipukul oleh Daud 1CH 14:16
     -Tujuh anak Saul dibunuh, untuk membalaskan dendam penduduk 2SA 21:1-9
     -Salomo beribadah dan mempersembahkan kurban 1KI 3:4
     -Memiliki mimpi tentang kebenaran 1KI 3:5; 9:2
     -Abner membunuh Asahel pada 2SA 3:30
     -Ismael bin Netanya dikalahkan di, oleh Yohanan JER 41:11-16
-2. Kumpulan 2SA 2:13; Yer 41:12

subject: GIDEON
entry:
-Call of, by an angel JDG 6:11,14
-His excuses JDG 6:15
-Promises of the Lord to JDG 6:16
-Angel attests the call to, by miracle JDG 6:21-24
-He destroys the altar of Baal, and builds one to the Lord JDG 6:25-27
-His prayer tests JDG 6:36-40
-Leads an army against and defeats the Midianites JDG 6:33-35; 7; 8:4-12
-Reproaches the Ephraimites for not joining in the campaign against the Midianites JDG 8:1-3
-Avenges himself upon the people of Succoth JDG 8:14-17
-Israel desires to make him king; he refuses JDG 8:22,23

subject: GOURD
entry:
-Jonah's, believed to be a vine resembling the American squash, used in Assyria to cover huts JON 4:6-10
-The wild gourd in this case is supposed to be a plant like the cucumber (in appearance) 2KI 4:39
entry_id:
- Tanaman Yunus, yang diyakini merupakan tanaman merambat yang menyerupai labu Amerika, digunakan di Asyur untuk menutupi gubuk YOHANES 4:6-10
-Labu liar dalam hal ini seharusnya adalah tanaman seperti mentimun (tampaknya) 2KI 4:39

subject: HARAN

-1. Father of Lot and brother of Abraham GEN 11:26-31
-2. Son of Caleb 1CH 2:46
-3. A Levite 1CH 23:9
-4. Also called CHARRAN
     -A place in Mesopotamia to which Terah and Abraham migrated GEN 11:31; 12:4,5; ACT 7:4
     -Death of Terah at GEN 11:32
     -Abraham leaves, by divine command GEN 12:1-5
     -Jacob flees to GEN 27:43; 28:7; 29
     -Returns from, with Rachel and Leah GEN 31:17-21
     -Conquest of, king of Assyria 2KI 19:12
     -Merchants of EZK 27:23
     -Idolatry in JOS 24:2,14; ISA 37:12

subject: HARP
entry:
-A stringed instrument of music ISA 38:20; EZK 33:32; HAB 3:19
-With three strings (margin) 1SA 18:6
-Ten strings PSA 33:2; 92:3; 144:9; 150:4
-Originated with Jubal GEN 4:21
-Made of almug wood 1KI 10:12
-David skillful in manipulating 1SA 16:16,23
-Used in worship 1SA 10:5; 1CH 16:5; 25:1-7; 2CH 5:12,13; 29:25; PSA 33:2; 43:4; 49:4; 57:8; 71:22; 81:2; 92:3; 98:5; 108:2; 147:7; 149:3; 150:3
-Used, in national jubilees, after the triumph over Goliath, (margin) 1SA 18:6
-Over the armies of Ammon and Moab 2CH 20:28; with 20:20-29
-When the new walls of Jerusalem were dedicated NEH 12:27,36
-Used in festivities GEN 31:27; JOB 21:11,12; ISA 5:12; 23:16; 24:8; 30:32; EZK 26:13; REV 18:22
-In mourning JOB 30:31
-Discordant 1CO 14:7
-Hung on the willows by the captive Jews PSA 137:2
-Heard in heaven, in John's apocalyptic vision REV 5:8; 14:2; 15:2
-The symbol used in the psalmody to indicate when the harp was to be introduced in the music was "Neginoth." See titles of PSA 4; 6; 54; 55; 61; 67; 76
-See MUSIC, INSTRUMENTS OF

-Alat musik petik ISA 38:20; EZK 33:32; HAB 3:19

subject: HELL
entry:
-(In the A. V. this word occurs in O. T. Scriptures, cited below, and is the translation of the Hebrew word "sheol," which signifies the unseen state)
-In the R. V. of O. T. it appears only in ISA 5:14; 14:9,15; 28:15,18; 57:9; EZK 31:16,17; 32:21,27; AMO 9:2; JON 2:2; HAB 2:5
-In the R. V., "sheol" is translated "lowest pit" DEU 32:22; PSA 86:13
-And it is translated "pit" in PSA 55:15
-In the R. V. the word "Sheol" itself occurs in the following scriptures 2SA 22:6; JOB 11:8; 26:6; PSA 9:17; 16:10; 18:5; 116:3; 139:8; PRO 5:5; 7:27; 9:18; 15:11,24; 23:14; 27:20
-Sheol is translated "grave" in A. V. in GEN 37:35; 42:38; 44:29,31; 1SA 2:6; 1KI 2:6; 9; JOB 7:9; 14:13; 17:13; 21:13; 24:19; PSA 6:5; 30:3; 31:17; 49:14,15; 88:3; 89:48; 141:7; PRO 1:12; 30:16; ECC 9:10; So 8:6; HOS 13:14
-In the R. V. the Greek word "gehenna" is translated "hell" in the following scriptures MAT 5:22,29,30; 10:28; 18:9; 23:15,33; MRK 9:43,45,47; LUK 12:5; JAS 3:6
-The R. V. has introduced "Hades," the word found in the Greek text, which signifies the unseen world, in the following scriptures MAT 11:23; 16:18; LUK 10:15; 16:23; ACT 2:27,31; REV 1:18; 6:8; 20:13,14
-THE FUTURE HOME OF THE WICKED PSA 9:17; PRO 5:5; 9:13,15-18; 15:24; 23:13,14; ISA 30:33; 33:14; MAT 3:12; 5:29,30; 7:13,14; 8:11,12; 10:28; 13:30,38-42,49,50; 16:18; 18:8,9,34,35; 22:13; 25:28-30,41,46; MRK 9:43-48; LUK 3:17; 16:23-26,28; ACT 1:25; 2TH 1:9; 2PE 2:4; Jude 1:6-23; REV 2:11; 9:1,2; 11:7; 14:10,11; 19:20; 20:10,15; 21:8
     -See WICKED, PUNISHMENT OF
entry_id:
-(Dalam A.V. kata ini muncul dalam Kitab Suci O.T, dikutip di bawah, dan merupakan terjemahan dari kata Ibrani "sheol", yang berarti keadaan yang tidak terlihat)
-Dalam R.V. dari O.T. hanya muncul di ISA 5:14; 14:9,15; 28:15,18; 57:9; EZK 31:16,17; 32:21,27; AMO 9:2; YOHANES 2:2; HAB 2:5
-Dalam R.V., "sheol" diterjemahkan "lubang terendah" DEU 32:22; PSA 86:13
-Dan diterjemahkan "lubang" dalam PSA 55:15
-Dalam R.V. kata "Sheol" sendiri muncul dalam kitab suci berikut 2SA 22:6; AYUB 11:8; 26:6; PSA 9:17; 16:10; 18:5; 116:3; 139:8; PRO 5:5; 7:27; 9:18; 15:11,24; 23:14; 27:20
-Sheol diterjemahkan "kuburan" dalam A. V. dalam KEJADIAN 37:35; 42:38; 44:29,31; 1SA 2:6; 1KI 2:6; 9; PEKERJAAN 7:9; 14:13; 17:13; 21:13; 24:19; PSA 6:5; 30:3; 31:17; 49:14,15; 88:3; 89:48; 141:7; PRO 1:12; 30:16; PAK 9:10; Jadi 8:6; HOS 13:14
-Dalam R.V. kata Yunani "gehenna" diterjemahkan "neraka" dalam kitab suci berikut MAT 5:22,29,30; 10:28; 18:9; 23:15,33; Mrk 9:43,45,47; Lukas 12:5; Yak 3:6
-R.V. telah memperkenalkan "Hades," kata yang ditemukan dalam teks Yunani, yang menandakan dunia gaib, dalam kitab suci berikut MAT 11:23; 16:18; Lukas 10:15; 16:23; BERTINDAK 2:27,31; Wahyu 1:18; 6:8; 20:13,14
-RUMAH MASA DEPAN DARI ORANG JAHAT PSA 9:17; PRO 5:5; 9:13,15-18; 15:24; 23:13,14; ISA 30:33; 33:14; MAT 3:12; 5:29,30; 7:13,14; 8:11,12; 10:28; 13:30,38-42,49,50; 16:18; 18:8,9,34,35; 22:13; 25:28-30,41,46; Mrk 9:43-48; Lukas 3:17; 16:23-26,28; BERTINDAK 1:25; 2 1:9; 2PE 2:4; Yudas 1:6-23; Wahyu 2:11; 9:1,2; 11:7; 14:10,11; 19:20; 20:10,15; 21:8
     -Lihat JAHAT, HUKUMAN TERHADAP

subject: ISAAC
entry:
-1. The miraculous son of Abraham GEN 17:15-19; 18:1-15; 21:1-8; JOS 24:3; 1CH 1:28; GAL 4:28; HEB 11:11
     -Ancestor of Jesus MAT 1:2
     -Offered in sacrifice by his father GEN 22:1-19; HEB 11:17; JAS 2:21
     -Is provided a wife from among his relatives GEN 24; 25:20
     -Abrahamic covenant confirmed in GEN 26:2-5; 1CH 16:15-19
     -Lives in the south country at the well called Lahai-roi GEN 24:62; 25:11
     -With Ishmael, buries his father in the cave of Machpelah GEN 25:9
     -Esau and Jacob born to GEN 25:19-26; 1CH 1:34; JOS 24:4
     -Lives in Gerar GEN 26:7-11
     -Prospers GEN 26:12-14
     -Possesses large flocks and herds GEN 26:14
     -Digs wells, and is defrauded of them by the herdsmen of Abimelech GEN 26:15,21
     -Moves away to the valley of Gerar, afterward called Beer-sheba GEN 26:22-33
     -His old age, last blessing upon his sons GEN 27:18-40
     -Death and burial of GEN 35:27-29; 49:31
     -His filial obedience GEN 22:9
     -His peaceableness GEN 26:14-22
     -Was a prophet GEN 27:28,29,38,40; HEB 11:20
     -His devoutness GEN 24:63; 25:21; 26:25; MAT 8:11; LUK 13:28
     -Prophecies concerning GEN 17:16-21; 18:10-14; 21:12; 26:2-5,24; EXO 32:13; 1CH 16:16; ROM 9:7
-2. A designation of the ten tribes AMO 7:9
entry_id:
-1. Anak Abraham yang ajaib KEJADIAN 17:15-19; 18:1-15; 21:1-8; Yos 24:3; 1Taw 1:28; GAL 4:28; IBR 11:11
     -Leluhur Yesus MAT 1:2
     -Dipersembahkan sebagai korban oleh ayahnya GEN 22:1-19; IBR 11:17; Yak 2:21
     -Diberikan istri dari kalangan kerabatnya GEN 24; 25:20
     -Perjanjian Abraham ditegaskan dalam KEJADIAN 26:2-5; 1Taw 16:15-19
     -Tinggal di negara selatan di sumur bernama Lahai-roi GEN 24:62; 25:11
     -Bersama Ismael, menguburkan ayahnya di gua Makhpela GEN 25:9
     -Esau dan Yakub lahir dalam KEJADIAN 25:19-26; 1Taw 1:34; Yos 24:4
     -Hidup di Gerar GEN 26:7-11
     -Sejahtera KEJADIAN 26:12-14
     -Memiliki kawanan besar dan ternak KEJ 26:14
     -Menggali sumur, dan ditipu oleh para penggembala Abimelekh GEN 26:15,21
     -Berpindah ke lembah Gerar, selanjutnya disebut Beer-syeba GEN 26:22-33
     -Usia tuanya, berkah terakhir atas anak-anaknya KEJADIAN 27:18-40
     -Kematian dan penguburan GEN 35:27-29; 49:31
     -Ketaatannya sebagai anak GEN 22:9
     -KedamaianNya GEN 26:14-22
     -Apakah seorang nabi KEJADIAN 27:28,29,38,40; IBR 11:20
     -Kesalehan-Nya GEN 24:63; 25:21; 26:25; MAT 8:11; Lukas 13:28
     -Nubuatan mengenai KEJADIAN 17:16-21; 18:10-14; 21:12; 26:2-5,24; Kel 32:13; 1Taw 16:16; ROMA 9:7
-2. Sebutan untuk sepuluh suku AMO 7:9

subject: ISAIAH
entry:
-Also called ESAIAS
-Son of Amos ISA 1:1
-Prophesies in the days of Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, kings of Judah ISA 1:1; 6:1; 7:1,3; 14:27; 20:1; 36:1; 38:1; 39:1
-Prophecy at the time of the invasion by Tartan, of Assyria ISA 20:1
-Symbolically wears sackcloth, and walks barefoot as a sign to Israel ISA 20:2,3
-Comforts and encourages Hezekiah and the people during the siege of Jerusalem by Rab-shakeh 2KI 18; 19; ISA 37:6,7
-Comforts Hezekiah in his affliction 2KI 20:1-11; ISA 38
-Performs the miracle of the returning shadow to confirm Hezekiah's faith 2KI 20:8-11
-Reproves Hezekiah's folly in exhibiting his resources to the commissioners from Babylon 2KI 20:12-19; ISA 39
-Is the chronicler of the times of Uzziah and Hezekiah 2CH 26:22; 32:32
-PROPHECIES, REPROOFS, AND EXHORTATIONS OF
     -Foretells punishment of the Jews for idolatry, and reproves self-confidence and distrust of God ISA 2:6-20
     -Foretells the destruction of the Jews ISA 3
     -Promises to the remnant restoration of divine favour ISA 4:2-6; 6
     -Delineates the ingratitude of the Jews in the parable of the vineyard, and reproves it ISA 5:1-10
     -Denounces existing corruptions ISA 5:8-30
     -Foretells the failure of the plot of the Israelites and Syrians against Judah ISA 7:1-16
     -Denounces calamities against Israel and Judah ISA 7:16-25; 9:2-6
     -Foretells prosperity under Hezekiah, and the manifestation of the Messiah ISA 9:1-7
     -Denounces vengeance upon the enemies of Israel ISA 9:8-12
     -Denounces the wickedness of Israel, and foretells the judgments of God ISA 9:13-21
     -Denounces judgments against false prophets ISA 10:1-4
     -Foretells the destruction of Sennacherib's armies ISA 10:5-34
     -The restoration of Israel and the triumph of the Messiah's kingdom ISA 11
     -The burden of Babylon ISA 13; 14:1-28
     -Denunciation against the Philistines ISA 14:9-32
     -Burden of Moab ISA 15; 16
     -Burden of Damascus ISA 17
     -An obscure prophecy, supposed by some authorities to be directed against the Assyrians, by others against the Egyptians, and by others against the Ethiopians ISA 18
     -The burden of Egypt ISA 19; 20
     -Denunciations against Babylon ISA 21:1-10
     -Prophecy concerning Seir ISA 21:11,12
     -Arabia ISA 21:13-17
     -Concerning the conquest of Jerusalem, the captivity of Shebna, and the promotion of Eliakim ISA 22:1-22
     -The overthrow of Tyre ISA 23
     -The judgments upon the land, but that a remnant of the Jews would be saved ISA 25; 26; 27
     -Reproves Ephraim for his wickedness, and fortells the destruction by Shalmaneser ISA 28:1-5
     -Declares the glory of God upon the remnant who are saved ISA 28:5,6
     -Exposes the corruptions in Jerusalem and exhorts to repentance ISA 28:7-29
     -Foretells the invasion of Sennacherib, the distress of the Jews, and the destruction of the Assyrian army ISA 29:1-8
     -Denounces the hypocrisy of the Jews ISA 29:9-17
     -Promises a reformation ISA 29:18-24
     -Reproves the people for their confidence in Egypt, and their contempt of God ISA 30:1-17; 31:1-6
     -Declares the goodness and longsuffering of God toward them ISA 30:18-26; 32; 33; 34; 35
     -Reproves the Jews for their spiritual blindness and infidelity ISA 42:18-25
     -Promises ultimate restoration of the Jews ISA 43:1-13
     -Foretells the ultimate destruction of Babylon ISA 43:14-17; 47
     -Exhorts the people to repent ISA 43:22-28
     -Comforts the Jewish community with promises, exposes the folly of idolatry, and their future deliverance from captivity by Cyrus ISA 44; 45:1-5; 48:20
     -Fortells the conversion of the Gentiles and the triumph of the gospel ISA 45:5-25
     -Denounces the evils of idolatry ISA 46
     -Reproves the Jews for their idolatries and other wickedness ISA 48
     -Exhorts to sanctification ISA 56:1-8
     -Foretells calamities to Judah ISA 59:9-12; with 57; 58; 59
     -Foreshadows the person and the kingdom of the Messiah ISA 32
entry_id:
-Juga disebut ESAIAS
-Putra Amos ISA 1:1
-Nubuat pada zaman Uzia, Yotam, Ahas, dan Hizkia, raja Yehuda ISA 1:1; 6:1; 7:1,3; 14:27; 20:1; 36:1; 38:1; 39:1
-Nubuatan pada saat invasi Tartan, Asyur ISA 20:1
-Secara simbolis memakai kain kabung, dan berjalan tanpa alas kaki sebagai tanda Israel ISA 20:2,3
-Menghibur dan menyemangati Hizkia dan rakyatnya selama pengepungan Yerusalem oleh Rab-shakeh 2KI 18; 19; ISA 37:6,7
-Menghibur Hizkia dalam kesusahannya 2KI 20:1-11; SA 38
-Melakukan mukjizat kembalinya bayangan untuk meneguhkan iman Hizkia 2KI 20:8-11
-Menegur kebodohan Hizkia yang memamerkan kekayaannya kepada para komisaris dari Babilonia 2KI 20:12-19; SA 39
-Apakah penulis sejarah zaman Uzia dan Hizkia 2CH 26:22; 32:32
-NUBUATAN, teguran, dan nasehat
     -Meramalkan hukuman bagi orang Yahudi karena penyembahan berhala, dan menegur rasa percaya diri dan ketidakpercayaan kepada Tuhan ISA 2:6-20
     -Meramalkan kehancuran kaum Yahudi ISA 3
     -Janji pemulihan sisa perkenanan ilahi ISA 4:2-6; 6
     -Menggambarkan rasa tidak berterima kasih orang Yahudi dalam perumpamaan tentang kebun anggur, dan menegurnya ISA 5:1-10
     -Mencela korupsi yang ada ISA 5:8-30
     -Meramalkan kegagalan rencana bangsa Israel dan Siria terhadap Yehuda ISA 7:1-16
     -Mengecam malapetaka terhadap Israel dan Yehuda ISA 7:16-25; 9:2-6
     -Meramalkan kemakmuran di bawah Hizkia, dan manifestasi Mesias ISA 9:1-7
     -Mencela pembalasan terhadap musuh Israel ISA 9:8-12
     -Mencela kejahatan Israel, dan meramalkan penghakiman Tuhan ISA 9:13-21
     -Mencela penghakiman terhadap nabi palsu ISA 10:1-4
     -Meramalkan kehancuran tentara Sanherib ISA 10:5-34
     -Pemulihan Israel dan kemenangan kerajaan Mesias ISA 11
     -Beban Babel ISA 13; 14:1-28
     -Kecaman terhadap orang Filistin ISA 14:9-32
     -Beban Moab ISA 15; 16
     -Beban Damaskus ISA 17
     -Sebuah nubuatan yang tidak jelas, yang menurut beberapa ahli ditujukan terhadap bangsa Asiria, oleh pihak lain terhadap bangsa Mesir, dan oleh pihak lain terhadap bangsa Etiopia. ISA 18
     -Beban Mesir ISA 19; 20
     -Kecaman terhadap Babel ISA 21:1-10
     -Nubuatan tentang Seir ISA 21:11,12
     -Arab ISA 21:13-17
     -Tentang penaklukan Yerusalem, penawanan Sebna, dan promosi Eliakim ISA 22:1-22
     -Penggulingan Ban ISA 23
     -Penghakiman atas negeri itu, tetapi sisa orang Yahudi akan diselamatkan ISA 25; 26; 27
     -Menegur Efraim atas kejahatannya, dan meramalkan kehancurannya oleh Shalmaneser ISA 28:1-5
     -Menyatakan kemuliaan Tuhan atas umat sisa yang diselamatkan ISA 28:5,6
     -Mengungkapkan kerusakan di Yerusalem dan mendesak pertobatan ISA 28:7-29
     -Meramaikan invasi Sanherib, kesusahan orang Yahudi, dan kehancuran tentara Asyur ISA 29:1-8
     -Mencela kemunafikan orang Yahudi ISA 29:9-17
     -Menjanjikan reformasi ISA 29:18-24
     -Menegur orang-orang karena kepercayaan mereka terhadap Mesir, dan penghinaan mereka terhadap Tuhan ISA 30:1-17; 31:1-6
     -Menyatakan kebaikan dan kesabaran Tuhan terhadap mereka ISA 30:18-26; 32; 33; 34; 35
     -Menegur orang-orang Yahudi karena kebutaan rohani dan ketidaksetiaan mereka ISA 42:18-25
     -Menjanjikan pemulihan akhir bagi orang-orang Yahudi ISA 43:1-13
     -Meramalkan kehancuran akhir Babilonia ISA 43:14-17; 47
     -Menasihati umat agar bertaubat ISA 43:22-28
     -Menghibur komunitas Yahudi dengan janji-janji, mengungkap kebodohan penyembahan berhala, dan pembebasan mereka di masa depan dari penawanan oleh Cyrus ISA 44; 45:1-5; 48:20
     -Meramaikan pertobatan bangsa kafir dan kemenangan injil ISA 45:5-25
     -Mencela keburukan penyembahan berhala ISA 46
     -Menegur orang-orang Yahudi atas penyembahan berhala dan kejahatan lainnya ISA 48
     -Anjuran pengudusan ISA 56:1-8
     -Meramalkan malapetaka terhadap Yehuda ISA 59:9-12; dengan 57; 58; 59
     -Membayangkan pribadi dan kerajaan Mesias ISA 32

entry:

     -Prayer of Abraham for GEN 17:18,20
     -Circumcised GEN 17:23-26
     -Promised to be the father of a nation GEN 16:11,12; 17:20; 21:12,13,18
     -Sent away by Abraham GEN 21:6-21
     -With Isaac buries his father GEN 25:9
     -Children of GEN 25:12-18; 1CH 1:29-31
     -Daughter of, marries Esau GEN 28:9; 36:2,3
     -Death of GEN 25:17,18

subject: ISRAEL
entry:
-1. A name given to Jacob GEN 32:24-32; 2KI 17:34; HOS 12:3,4
-2. A name of the Messiah in prophecy ISA 49:3
-3. A name given to the descendants of Jacob, a nation
     -Also called ISRAELITES, and HEBREWS GEN 43:32; EXO 1:15; 9:7; 10:3; 21:2; LEV 23:42; JOS 13:6
     -Etc 1SA 4:6; 13:3,19; 14:11,21; PHP 3:5
-(TRIBES OF ISRAEL were named after the sons of Jacob)
-(Usually, in lists, the names of Levi and Joseph, two sons of Jacob, do not appear)
     -The descendants of Levi were consecrated to the rites of religion, and the two sons of Joseph, Ephraim and Manasseh, were adopted by Jacob in Joseph's place GEN 48:5; JOS 14:4
     -And their names appear in the catalogues of tribes instead of those of Levi and Joseph, as follows, ASHER, BENJAMIN, DAN, EPHRAIM, GAD, ISSACHAR, JUDAH, MANASSEH, NAPHTALI, REUBEN, SIMEON, ZEBULUN
     -Names of, seen in John's vision, on the gates of the New Jerusalem REV 21:12
     -Prophecies concerning GEN 15:5,13; 25:23; 26:4; 27:28,29,40; 48:19; 49; DEU 33
     -Prophecies about the multitude of GEN 13:16; 15:5; 22:17; 26:4; 28:14
     -Prophecies of their captivity in Eqypt GEN 15:13,14; ACT 7:6,7
     -Divided into families, each of which had a chief NUM 25:14; 26; 36:1; JOS 7:14; 1CH 4; 5; 6; 7; 8
     -Number of, who went into Egypt GEN 46:8-27; EXO 1:5; DEU 10:22; ACT 7:14
     -Number of, at the time of the exodus EXO 12:37,38; with GEN 47:27; EXO 1:7-20; PSA 105:24; ACT 7:17
     -Number of, fit for military service when they left Egypt EXO 12:37
     -Number of, at Sinai, by tribes NUM 1:1-50
     -Number of, after the plague NUM 26
     -Number of, when David counted (conducted a census) 2SA 24:1-9; 1CH 21:5,6; 27:23,24
     -Number of, after the captivity EZR 2:64; NEH 7:66,67
     -Number of, in John's apocalyptic vision REV 7:1-8
     -Lived in Goshen GEN 46:28-34; 47:4-10,27,28
     -Lived in Egypt for four-hundred and thirty years EXO 12:40,41; with GEN 15:13; ACT 7:6; GAL 3:17
     -Were enslaved and oppressed by the Egyptians EXO 1; 2; 5; ACT 7:18-21
     -Their groaning heard by God EXO 2:23-25
     -Moses commissioned as the deliverer EXO 3:2-22; 4:1-17
     -The land of Egypt was plagued on their account
          -See EGYPT
     -Exempt from the plagues EXO 8:22,23; 9:4-6,26; 10:23; 11:7; 12:13
     -Children were spared when the firstborn of the Egyptians were killed EXO 12:13,23
     -Instituted the Passover EXO 12:1-28
     -Borrowed jewels from the Egyptians EXO 11:2,3; 12:35,36; PSA 105:37
     -Urged by the Egyptians to depart EXO 12:31-39
     -Journey from Rameses to Succoth EXO 12:37-39
     -Made the journey by night EXO 12:42
     -The day of their deliverance to be a memorial EXO 12:42; 13:3-16
     -Led by God EXO 13:18,21,22
     -Providentially cared for DEU 8:3,4; 29:5,6; 34:7; NEH 9:21; PSA 105:37
     -See MANNA
     -See CLOUD, PILLAR OF
     -Journey from Succoth to Etham EXO 13:20
     -Journey to Pi-hahiroth EXO 14:2; NUM 33:5-7
     -Pursued by the Egyptians EXO 14:5-31
     -Pass through the Red Sea EXO 14:19-22; DEU 11:4; PSA 78; 105; 106; 136
     -The order of the march NUM 2
     -Journey to Marah EXO 15:23; NUM 33:8
     -Complained on account of the bitter water EXO 15:23-25
     -Water of, sweetened EXO 15:25
     -Journey to Elim EXO 15:27; NUM 33:9
     -For the itinerary, see NUM 33
     -Complained for food EXO 16:2,3
     -Provided with manna and quail EXO 16:4-36
     -Complained for lack of water at Rephidim EXO 17:2-7
     -Water miraculously supplied from the rock at Meribah EXO 17:5-7
     -Defeat the Amalekites EXO 17:13; DEU 25:17,18

-5. JUDAH
     -The nation composed of the tribes of Judah and Benjamin, called JUDAH, and JEWS, ruled by the descendants of David ISA 11:12

subject: JACOB
entry:
-Son of Isaac, and the twin brother of Esau GEN 25:24-26; JOS 24:4; 1CH 1:34; ACT 7:8
-Ancestor of Jesus MAT 1:2
-Given in answer to prayer GEN 25:21
-Obtains Esau's birthright for just one bowl of stew GEN 25:29-34; HEB 12:16
-Fradulently obtains his father's blessing GEN 27:1-29; HEB 11:20
-Esau seeks to kill, escapes to Padan-aram GEN 27:41-46; 28:1-5; HOS 12:12
-His vision of the ladder GEN 28:10-22
-God confirms the covenant of Abraham to GEN 28:13-22; 35:9-15; 1CH 16:13-18
-Sojourns in Haran with his uncle, Laban GEN 29:30; HOS 12:12
-Serves fourteen years for Leah and Rachel GEN 29:15-30; HOS 12:12
-Sharp practice of, with the flocks and herds of Laban GEN 30:32-43
-Dissatisfied with Laban's treatment and returns to the land of Canaan GEN 31
-Meets angels of God on the journey, and calls the place "Mahanaim," GEN 32:1,2
-Dreads to meet Esau; sends him presents; wrestles with an angel GEN 32
-Name of, changed to "Israel," GEN 32:28; 35:10
-Reconciliation of, with Esau GEN 33:4
-Journeys to Succoth GEN 33:17
-Journeys to Shalem, where he purchase a parcel of ground from Hamor and erects an altar GEN 33:18-20
-His daughter, Dinah, is raped GEN 34
-Returns to Beth-el, where he builds an altar, and erects and dedicates a pillar GEN 35:1-7
-Deborah, Rebekah's nurse, dies, and is buried at Beth-el GEN 35:8
-Journeys to Ephrath; Benjamin is born to; Rachel dies; and is "buried on the way to Ephrath, which is Bethlehem," GEN 35:16-19; 48:7
-Erects a monument at Rachel's grave GEN 35:20
-The incest of his son, Reuben, with his concubine, Bilhah GEN 35:22
-List of the names of his twelve sons GEN 35:23-26
-Returns to Arbah, the city of his father GEN 35:27
-Lives in the land of Canaan GEN 37:1
-His partiality for his son, Joseph, and the consequent jealousy of his other sons GEN 37:3,4
-Joseph's prophetic dream concerning GEN 37:9-11
-His grief over the loss of Joseph GEN 37:34,35
-Sends to Egypt to buy corn (grain) GEN 42:1,2; 43:1-14
-His grief over the detention of Simeon and the demand for Benjamin to be taken into Egypt GEN 42:36
-His love for Benjamin GEN 43:14; 44:29
-Hears that Joseph is still alive GEN 45:26-28
-Moves to Egypt GEN 46:1-7; 1SA 12:8; PSA 105:23; ACT 7:14,15
-The list of his children and grandchildren who went down into Egypt GEN 46:8-27
-Meets Joseph GEN 46:28-34
-Pharaoh receives him, and is blessed by Jacob GEN 47:1-10
-The land of Goshen assigned to GEN 47:11,12,27
-Lives in Egypt for seventeen years GEN 47:28
-Exacts a promise from Joseph to bury him with his forefathers GEN 47:29-31
-His benediction upon Joseph and his two sons GEN 48:15-22
-Gives the land of the Amorites to Joseph GEN 48:22; JHN 4:5
-His final prophetic benedictions upon his sons
     -Upon Reuben GEN 49:3,4
     -Simeon and Levi GEN 49:5-7
     -Judah GEN 49:8-12
     -Zebulun GEN 49:13
     -Issachar GEN 49:14,15
     -Dan GEN 49:16-18
     -Gad GEN 49:19
     -Asher GEN 49:20
     -Naphtali GEN 49:21
     -Joseph GEN 49:22-26
     -Benjamin GEN 49:27
-Charges his sons to bury him in the field of Machpelah GEN 49:29,30
-Death of GEN 49:33
-Body of, embalmed GEN 50:2
-40 Days mourning for GEN 50:3
-Burial of GEN 50:4-13
-Descendants of GEN 29:31-35; 30:1-24; 35:18,22-26; 46:8-27; EXO 1:1-5; 1CH 2:9
-Prophecies concerning himself and his descendants GEN 25:23; 27:28,29; 28:10-15; 31:3; 35:9-13; 46:3; DEU 1:8; PSA 105:10,11
-His wealth GEN 36:6,7
-The well of JHN 4:5-30
entry_id:
-Putra Ishak, dan saudara kembar Esau GEN 25:24-26; Yos 24:4; 1Taw 1:34; TINDAKAN 7:8
-Leluhur Yesus MAT 1:2
-Diberikan sebagai jawaban atas doa KEJADIAN 25:21
-Memperoleh hak kesulungan Esau hanya dengan satu mangkuk rebusan KEJADIAN 25:29-34; IBR 12:16
-Dengan licik memperoleh restu ayahnya GEN 27:1-29; IBR 11:20
-Esau berusaha membunuh, kabur ke Padan-aram GEN 27:41-46; 28:1-5; HOS 12:12
-Penglihatannya tentang tangga KEJADIAN 28:10-22
-Tuhan meneguhkan perjanjian Abraham pada KEJADIAN 28:13-22; 35:9-15; 1Taw 16:13-18
-Tinggal di Haran bersama pamannya, Laban GEN 29:30; HOS 12:12
-Melayani empat belas tahun untuk Leah dan Rachel GEN 29:15-30; HOS 12:12
-Praktik yang tajam, dengan kawanan ternak Laban GEN 30:32-43
-Tidak puas dengan perlakuan Laban dan kembali ke tanah Kanaan GEN 31
-Bertemu dengan malaikat Tuhan dalam perjalanan, dan menyebut tempat itu "Mahanaim," KEJADIAN 32:1,2
-Takut bertemu Esau; mengiriminya hadiah; bergulat dengan malaikat GEN 32
-Nama, diubah menjadi "Israel," KEJADIAN 32:28; 35:10
-Rekonsiliasi, dengan Esau GEN 33:4
-Perjalanan ke Sukot GEN 33:17
-Perjalanan ke Shalem, di mana dia membeli sebidang tanah dari Hamor dan mendirikan sebuah altar KEJADIAN 33:18-20
-Putrinya, Dinah, diperkosa GEN 34
-Kembali ke Betel, di mana ia membangun sebuah mezbah, dan mendirikan serta meresmikan sebuah pilar. KEJADIAN 35:1-7
-Debora, perawat Ribka, meninggal, dan dimakamkan di Betel KEJADIAN 35:8
-Perjalanan ke Efrat; Benjamin lahir dari; Rakhel meninggal; dan "dikuburkan di jalan menuju Efrat, yaitu Betlehem", KEJADIAN 35:16-19; 48:7
-Mendirikan monumen di makam Rachel GEN 35:20
-Inses putranya, Ruben, dengan selirnya, Bilhah KEJADI 35:22
-Daftar nama kedua belas putranya GEN 35:23-26
-Kembali ke Arbah, kota ayahnya GEN 35:27
-Tinggal di tanah Kanaan GEN 37:1
-Keberpihakannya terhadap putranya, Yusuf, dan akibat kecemburuannya terhadap putra-putranya yang lain. KEJADIAN 37:3,4
-Mimpi kenabian Yusuf mengenai KEJADIAN 37:9-11
-Kesedihannya atas kehilangan Yusuf GEN 37:34,35
-Mengirim ke Mesir untuk membeli jagung (biji-bijian) KEJADIAN 42:1,2; 43:1-14
-Kesedihannya atas penahanan Simeon dan tuntutan agar Benyamin dibawa ke Mesir KEJADIAN 42:36
-Kecintaannya pada Benyamin GEN 43:14; 44:29
-Mendengar Yusuf masih hidup KEJADIAN 45:26-28
-Pindah ke Mesir KEJADIAN 46:1-7; 1Sam 12:8; PSA 105:23; TINDAKAN 7:14,15
-Daftar anak cucunya yang turun ke Mesir KEJADIAN 46:8-27
-Bertemu Yusuf KEJADIAN 46:28-34
-Firaun menerimanya, dan diberkati oleh Yakub GEN 47:1-10
-Tanah Gosyen yang ditetapkan dalam KEJADIAN 47:11,12,27
-Tinggal di Mesir selama tujuh belas tahun GEN 47:28
-Tepat janji dari Yusuf untuk menguburkannya bersama nenek moyangnya KEJADIAN 47:29-31
-Doa-Nya atas Yusuf dan kedua putranya KEJADIAN 48:15-22
-Memberikan tanah orang Amori kepada Yusuf GEN 48:22; Yohanes 4:5
-Sahihan kenabian terakhirnya atas putra-putranya
     -Atas Ruben GEN 49:3,4
     -Simeon dan Lewi KEJADIAN 49:5-7
     -Yehuda KEJADIAN 49:8-12
     -Zebulun KEJADIAN 49:13
     -Isakhar KEJADIAN 49:14,15
     -Dan KEJADIAN 49:16-18
     -Gad KEJADIAN 49:19
     -Asyer KEJADIAN 49:20
     -Naftali KEJADIAN 49:21
     -Yusuf KEJADIAN 49:22-26
     -Benyamin KEJADIAN 49:27
-Menyuruh anak-anaknya untuk menguburkannya di ladang Makhpela GEN 49:29,30
-Kematian GEN 49:33
-Tubuh, dibalsem GEN 50:2
-40 Hari berkabung untuk GEN 50:3
-Penguburan KEJADIAN 50:4-13
-Keturunan dari KEJADIAN 29:31-35; 30:1-24; 35:18,22-26; 46:8-27; Kel 1:1-5; 1Taw 2:9
-Nubuatan tentang dirinya dan keturunannya KEJADIAN 25:23; 27:28,29; 28:10-15; 31:3; 35:9-13; 46:3; UJIAN 1:8; PSA 105:10,11
-Kekayaannya KEJ 36:6,7
-Sumur Yohanes 4:5-30

subject: JAMES
entry:
-1. An apostle. Son of Zebedee and Salome MAT 4:21; 27:56; MRK 15:40; 16:1
     -Brother of John and a fisherman LUK 5:10
     -Called to be an apostle MAT 4:21,22; 10:2; MRK 1:19,20; LUK 6:14; ACT 1:13
     -Surnamed Boanerges by Jesus MRK 3:17
-(An intimate companion of Jesus, and present with him)
          -At the great catch of fish LUK 5:10
          -At the healing of Peter's mother-in-law MRK 1:29
          -At the raising of the daughter of Jairus MRK 5:37; LUK 8:51
          -At the transfiguration of Jesus MAT 17:1; MRK 9:2; LUK 9:28
          -In Gethsemane MAT 26:37; MRK 14:33
     -Asks Jesus concerning his second coming MRK 13:3
     -Bigotry of LUK 9:54
     -Civil ambitions of MAT 20:20-23; MRK 10:35-41
     -Present at Lake Tiberias when Jesus revealed himself to the disciples after his resurrection JHN 21:2; 1CO 15:7
     -Martyred ACT 12:2
-2. An apostle
     -Son of Alphaeus MAT 10:3; MRK 3:18; LUK 6:15; ACT 1:13; 12:17

subject: JEPHTHAH
entry:
-(A judge (leader, hero) of Israel)
-Illegitimate, and therefore not entitled to inherit his father's property JDG 11:1,2
-Escapes the violence of his half-brothers; lives in the land of Tob JDG 11:3
-Recalled from the land of Tob by the elders of Gilead JDG 11:5
-Made captain of the army JDG 11:5-11
-Made head of the land of Gilead JDG 11:7-11
-His message to the king of the Ammonites JDG 11:12-28
-Leads the army of Israel against the Ammonites JDG 11:29-33
-His rash vow concerning bis daughter JDG 11:31,34-40
-Falsely accused by the Ephraimites JDG 12:1
-Leads the army of the Gileadites against the Ephraimites JDG 12:4
-Leads Israel for six years, dies, and is buried in Gilead JDG 12:7
-Faith of HEB 11:32
entry_id:
-(Seorang hakim (pemimpin, pahlawan) Israel)
-Tidak sah, dan karena itu tidak berhak mewarisi harta ayahnya Hak 11:1,2
-Lolos dari kekerasan saudara tirinya; tinggal di tanah Tob JDG 11:3
-Diingat dari tanah Tob oleh tua-tua Gilead Hak 11:5
-Dijadikan kapten tentara JDG 11:5-11
-Dijadikan kepala tanah Gilead JDG 11:7-11
-Pesan-Nya kepada raja orang Amon Hak 11:12-28
-Memimpin tentara Israel melawan bani Amon Hak 11:29-33
-Sumpahnya yang gegabah mengenai putrinya Hak 11:31,34-40
-Dituduh secara salah oleh orang Efraim Hak 12:1
-Memimpin pasukan Gilead melawan orang Efraim Hak 12:4
-Memimpin Israel selama enam tahun, meninggal, dan dimakamkan di Gilead JDG 12:7
-Iman IBR 11:32

subject: JEROBOAM

subject: JEWS
entry:
-A corrupted form, doubtless, of Judah, and applied to the people of the kingdom of Judah and Benjamin 2KI 16:6; 25:25; 2CH 32:18
-(After the dissolution of the kingdom of Israel the name was applied to all Israelites, as well as to those of the two remaining tribes)
-See ISRAEL

-(Setelah pembubaran kerajaan Israel, nama tersebut diterapkan pada seluruh bangsa Israel, serta pada dua suku yang tersisa)

subject: JOAB
entry:
-1. Son of David's sister 1CH 2:16
     -Commander of David's army 2SA 8:16; 20:23; 1CH 11:6; 18:15; 27:34
     -Dedicated the plunder of his battles 1CH 26:28
     -Defeated the Jebusites 1CH 11:6
     -Defeats and kills Abner 2SA 2:13-32; 3:27; 1KI 2:5
     -Destroys all the males in Edom 1KI 11:16
     -(See title) PSA 60
     -Defeats the Ammonites 2SA 10:7-14; 1CH 19:6-15
     -Captures Rabbah 2SA 11:1,15-25; 12:26-29; 1CH 20:1,2
     -Procures the return of Absalom to Jerusalem 2SA 14:1-24
     -Barley field of, burned by Absalom 2SA 14:29-33
     -Pursues and kills Absalom 2SA 18
     -Censures David for lamenting the death of Absalom 2SA 19:1-8
     -Replaced by Amasa as commander of David's army 2SA 17:25; 19:13
     -Kills Amasa 2SA 20:8-13; 1KI 2:5
     -Causes Sheba to be put to death 2SA 20:16-22
     -Opposes the numbering of the people 2SA 24:3; 1CH 21:3
     -Numbers the people 2SA 24:4-9; 1CH 21:4,5; 27:23,24
     -Supports Adonijah as successor to David 1KI 1:7; 2:28
     -Killed by Benaiah, under Solomon's order 1KI 2:29-34
-2. A grandson of Kenaz 1CH 4:14
-3. An Israelite (or the name of two Israelites) whose descendants returned from Babylon to Jerusalem EZR 2:6; 8:9; NEH 7:11
-4. "The household of Joab," 1CH 2:54
     -Probably identical with number one
entry_id:
-1. Anak saudara perempuan Daud 1CH 2:16
     -Panglima tentara Daud 2SA 8:16; 20:23; 1Taw 11:6; 18:15; 27:34
     -Mendedikasikan penjarahan pertempurannya 1CH 26:28
     -Mengalahkan orang Yebus 1CH 11:6
     -Kalahkan dan bunuh Abner 2SA 2:13-32; 3:27; 1KI 2:5
     -Memusnahkan semua laki-laki di Edom 1KI 11:16
     -(Lihat judul) PSA 60
     -Kalahkan orang Amon 2SA 10:7-14; 1Taw 19:6-15
     -Menangkap Rabbah 2SA 11:1,15-25; 12:26-29; 1Taw 20:1,2
     -Mengadakan kembalinya Absalom ke Yerusalem 2SA 14:1-24
     -Ladang jelai, dibakar oleh Absalom 2SA 14:29-33
     -Mengejar dan membunuh Absalom 2SA 18
     -Mengecam Daud karena meratapi kematian Absalom 2SA 19:1-8
     -Digantikan oleh Amasa sebagai panglima tentara Daud 2SA 17:25; 19:13
     -Membunuh Amasa 2SA 20:8-13; 1KI 2:5
     -Menyebabkan Sheba dihukum mati 2SA 20:16-22
     -Menentang penomoran umat 2SA 24:3; 1Taw 21:3
     -Nomor orang 2SA 24:4-9; 1Taw 21:4,5; 27:23,24
     -Mendukung Adonia sebagai penerus Daud 1KI 1:7; 2:28
     -Dibunuh oleh Benaya, atas perintah Sulaiman 1KI 2:29-34
-2. Cucu Kenaz 1CH 4:14
-3. Seorang Israel (atau nama dua orang Israel) yang keturunannya kembali dari Babel ke Yerusalem EZR 2:6; 8:9; NEH 7:11
-4. "Rumah tangga Yoab," 1CH 2:54
     -Mungkin identik dengan nomor satu

subject: JOASH
entry:
-1. Son of Becher 1CH 7:8
-2. Keeper of the stores of oil 1CH 27:28

-4. Son of Ahab, king of Israel 1KI 22:26; 2CH 18:25
-5. Also called JEHOASH
-(Son of Ahaziah and king of Judah)
     -Saved from his grandmother by Jehosheba, his aunt, and hidden for six years 2KI 11:1-3; 2CH 22:11,12
     -Anointed king by the priest, Jehoiada 2KI 11:12-21; 2CH 23
     -Righteousness of, under influence of Jehoiada 2KI 12:2; 2CH 24:2
     -Repaired the temple 2KI 12:4-16; 2CH 24:4-14,27
     -Wickedness of, after Jehoiada's death 2CH 24:17-22
     -Procured peace from Hazael, king of Syria, by gift of dedicated treasures from the temple 2KI 12:17,18; 2CH 24:23,24
     -Prophecy against 2CH 24:19,20
     -Put Jehoiada's son to death 2CH 24:20-22; MAT 23:35
     -Diseases of 2CH 24:25
     -Conspired against and slain 2KI 12:20,21; 2CH 24:25,26
-6. A king of Israel
     -See JEHOAHAZ
-7. A descendant of Shelah 1CH 4:22
-8. One of David's officers 1CH 12:3

-(Putra Ahazia dan raja Yehuda)

     -Kejahatan, setelah kematian Yoyada 2CH 24:17-22
     -Memperoleh kedamaian dari Hazael, raja Siria, melalui pemberian harta karun yang dipersembahkan dari kuil 2KI 12:17,18; 2Taw 24:23,24
     -Nubuat melawan 2CH 24:19,20

     -Penyakit 2CH 24:25
     -Bersekongkol melawan dan membunuh 2KI 12:20,21; 2CH 24:25,26
-6. Seorang raja Israel
     -Lihat YEHOAHAZ
-7. Keturunan Selah 1CH 4:22
-8. Salah seorang perwira Daud 1CH 12:3

subject: JOHN
entry:
-1. The Baptist
     -Prophecies concerning ISA 40:3; MAL 4:5,6; LUK 1:11-17
-Miraculous birth of LUK 1:11-20,57-65
-Lives in the desert MAT 3:1; MRK 1:4; LUK 1:80; 3:2,3
-Mission of MAT 17:11; MRK 1:2-8; LUK 1:15-17,76-79; 3:4-6; JHN 1:7,8,15,22-28,31-34; 5:32-35; ACT 13:24,25; 19:4
-Ministry of MAT 3:1-3; MRK 1:4; LUK 3:2,3; JHN 1:6-8
-His influence upon the public mind MAT 3:5,6; 14:5; 21:32; MRK 1:5; 11:32; LUK 3:7,15; 20:6; JHN 1:35-40
-Testifies to the messiahship of Jesus MAT 3:11,12; MRK 1:7,8; LUK 3:16,17; JHN 1:15,26-36; 3:23-36; 5:32,33; 10:41; ACT 13:25
-Teaches his disciples to pray LUK 11:1
-Teaches his disciples to fast LUK 5:33
-The baptism which he taught
     -See BAPTISM
-Baptizes Jesus MAT 3:13-16; MRK 1:9-11; LUK 3:21,22; JHN 1:32
-The testimony of Jesus concerning (see below, Jesus discourses upon) JHN 5:32-35; MAT 17:12,13; 21:32; MRK 9:13
-His ministry not attested by miracles JHN 10:41
-Reproves Herod Antipas on account of his incest; Herod imprisons him, and beheads him MAT 4:12; 14:1-12; MRK 6:16-29; 9:13; LUK 3:18-20
-Sends two disciples to Jesus MAT 11:2-6; LUK 7:18-23
-Herod Antipas falsely supposes Jesus to be MAT 14:1,2; 16:14; MRK 6:14,16; LUK 9:19
-Character of MRK 6:20; JHN 5:35
-Jesus discourses upon MAT 11:7-19; LUK 7:24-33
-Affected probably by the doctrines of the stoics MAT 11:18; MRK 1:6; LUK 1:80
-A Nazarite MAT 11:18; LUK 1:15; 7:33
-2. The Apostle
     -Intimately associated with Jesus JHN 13:23-26; 21:20
     -Is present when Jesus performs the following miracles
     -The healing of Peter's mother-in-law MAT 8:14,15; MRK 1:30,31; LUK 4:38,39
     -The raising of the daughter of Jairus MRK 5:37; LUK 8:51
     -The two catches of fish LUK 5:10; JHN 21:1-7
     -The transfiguration MAT 17:1; MRK 9:2; LUK 9:28
     -Is present with Jesus in the garden of Gethsemane MAT 26:37; MRK 14:33; LUK 22:39
     -Intolerance of MRK 9:38; LUK 9:49,50,54-56
     -Civil ambitions of MAT 20:20-24; MRK 10:35-41
     -Prepares the Passover meal MAT 26:18,19; MRK 14:13-16; LUK 22:8-13
     -Present at the trial of Jesus which took place in front of the high priest JHN 18:15,16
     -Present at the crucifixion JHN 19:26,27
     -Present at the gravesite of Jesus JHN 20:2-8
     -Present when Jesus revealed himself at the Lake Galilee JHN 21
     -Present with Peter in the temple courtyard ACT 3:1-11
     -Lives in Jerusalem ACT 1:13
     -Is intrusted with the care of Mary, mother of Jesus JHN 19:26
     -Imprisoned by the rulers of the Jews ACT 4:1-19
     -Sent by the Jerusalem congregation with the commission to Samaria ACT 8:14-17
     -A pillar of the ekklesia (body of Christ) GAL 2:9
     -Writes to the congregations .See the EPISTLES OF JOHN 1JN 1; 2JN 1; 3JN 1
     -Writes his apocalyptic vision from Patmos Island REV 1:9
     -Prophecy concerning REV 10:11
-3. A relative of Annas the high priest ACT 4:6
-4. Whose surname was Mark
     -See MARK
entry_id:
-1. Pembaptis
     -Nubuatan tentang ISA 40:3; Mal 4:5,6; Lukas 1:11-17

subject: JOSEPH

     -Marries the daughter of the priest of On GEN 41:45
     -Provides against the seven years of famine GEN 41:46-57
     -Exports the produce of Egypt to other countries GEN 41:57

subject: JUDAH
entry:
-1. Son of Jacob GEN 35:23
     -Intercedes for Joseph's life when his brothers were about to kill him, and proposes that they sell him to the Ishmaelites GEN 37:26,27
     -Takes two wives GEN 38:1-6
     -Lives at Chezib GEN 38:5
     -His incest with his daughter-in-law GEN 38:12-26
     -Goes down into Egypt for corn (grain) GEN 43:1-10; 44:14-34; 46:28
     -Prophetic benediction of his father upon GEN 49:8-12
     -The ancestor of Jesus MAT 1:2,3; REV 5:5
-2. Tribe of
     -Prophecies concerning GEN 49:10
     -Enrollment of the military forces of
     -At Sinai NUM 1:26,27; 2:4
     -At Bezek 1SA 11:8; 2SA 24:9
     -On the plain of Moab NUM 26:22
     -Place of, in encampments and the march NUM 2:3,9; 10:14
     -By whom commanded NUM 2:3
     -Moses' benediction upon DEU 33:7
     -Commissioned by God to lead in the conquest of the promised land JDG 1:1-3; with 1:4-21
     -Make David king 2SA 2:1-11; 5:4,5
     -Rebuked by David for lukewarmness toward him after Absalom's defeat 2SA 19:11-15
     -Accused by the other tribes of stealing the heart of David 2SA 19:41-43
     -Loyal to David at the time of the insurrection led by Sheba 2SA 20:1,2
     -Is accorded the birthright forfeited by Reuben 1CH 5:1,2; 28:4; PSA 60:7
     -Loyal to the house of David at the time of the revolt of the ten tribes 1KI 12:20
     -Inheritance of JOS 15; 18:6; 19:1,9
-3. Name of two exiled priests EZR 10:23; NEH 12:8
-4. A Benjamite NEH 11:9
-5. A prince or priest who assisted in the dedication of the walls of Jerusalem NEH 12:34,36
entry_id:

subject: JUDAS (JUDE)
entry:
-1. Surnamed "Iscariot;"
     -Chosen as an apostle MAT 10:4; MRK 3:19; LUK 6:16; ACT 1:17
     -The treasurer of the disciples JHN 12:6; 13:29
     -His greed exemplified .By his protest against the breaking of the container of ointment JHN 12:4-6
     -By his bargaining to betray Jesus for a sum of money MAT 26:14-16; MRK 14:10,11; LUK 22:3-6; JHN 13:2
     -His apostasy JHN 17:12
     -Betrays the Lord Jesus MAT 26:47-50; MRK 14:43-45; LUK 22:47-49; JHN 18:2-5; ACT 1:16-25
     -Returns the money to the rulers of the Jews MAT 27:3-10
     -Hangs himself MAT 27:5; ACT 1:18
     -Prophecies concerning MAT 26:21-25; MRK 14:18-21; LUK 22:21-23; JHN 13:18-26; 17:12; ACT 1:16,20; with PSA 41:9; 109:8; ZEC 11:12,13
-2. One of the physical half-brothers of Jesus MAT 13:55; MRK 6:3
-3. The brother of James and probably the writer of the Epistle of Jude LUK 6:16; ACT 1:13; Jude 1:1
-4. An apostle, probably identical with LEBBAEUS, or THADDAEUS JHN 14:22
-5. Of Galilee, who stirred up a sedition among the Jews soon after the birth of Jesus ACT 5:37
-6. A disciple who hosted Paul ACT 9:11
-7. Surnamed "BARSABAS;"
     -A Christian sent to Antioch of Syria with Paul and Barnabas ACT 15:22-32
entry_id:
-1. Bernama "Iskariot;"
     -Terpilih sebagai rasul MAT 10:4; Mrk 3:19; Lukas 6:16; TINDAKAN 1:17
     -Bendahara para murid JHN 12:6; 13:29
     -Keserakahannya dicontohkan. Dengan protesnya terhadap pecahnya wadah minyak narwastu JHN 12:4-6
     -Dengan tawar-menawarnya untuk mengkhianati Yesus demi sejumlah uang MAT 26:14-16; Mrk 14:10,11; Lukas 22:3-6; Yohanes 13:2
     -Kemurtadannya JHN 17:12
     -Mengkhianati Tuhan Yesus MAT 26:47-50; Mrk 14:43-45; Luk 22:47-49; Yohanes 18:2-5; AKSI 1:16-25
     -Mengembalikan uang kepada penguasa Yahudi MAT 27:3-10
     -Gantung diri MAT 27:5; TINDAKAN 1:18
     -Nubuatan tentang MAT 26:21-25; Mrk 14:18-21; Lukas 22:21-23; Yohanes 13:18-26; 17:12; BERTINDAK 1:16,20; dengan PSA 41:9; 109:8; ZEC 11:12,13
-2. Salah satu saudara tiri Yesus secara fisik MAT 13:55; Mrk 6:3
-3. Saudara laki-laki Yakobus dan mungkin penulis Surat Yudas LUK 6:16; BERTINDAK 1:13; Yudas 1:1
-4. Seorang rasul, mungkin identik dengan LEBBAEUS, atau THADDAEUS JHN 14:22
-5. Tentang Galilea, yang memicu hasutan di kalangan orang Yahudi segera setelah kelahiran Yesus ACT 5:37
-6. Seorang murid yang menjadi pembawa acara Paulus ACT 9:11
-7. Nama keluarga "BARSABAS;"
     -Seorang Kristen diutus ke Antiokhia Siria bersama Paulus dan Barnabas ACT 15:22-32

subject: JUDEA
entry:
-1. Also called JUDAH and JUDAEA
-(The southern division of Palestine)
     -It extended from the Jordan River and the Dead Sea to the Mediterranean Sea, and from Shiloh on the north to the wilderness on the south MAT 4:25; LUK 5:17; JHN 4:47,54
     -The term applies to all of Palestine in LUK 1:5
     -It applies to the territory east of the Jordan River in MAT 19:1; MRK 10:1; LUK 23:5
-2. Wilderness of
     -Called Beth-arabah JOS 15:6,61
     -Assigned to Benjamin JOS 18:22
     -John the Baptist preaches in MAT 3:1; LUK 3:3
entry_id:
-1. Disebut juga YUDAH dan YUDAEA
-(Pembagian selatan Palestina)
     -Terbentang dari Sungai Yordan dan Laut Mati sampai ke Laut Tengah, dan dari Silo di utara sampai padang gurun di selatan MAT 4:25; Lukas 5:17; Yohanes 4:47,54
     -Istilah ini berlaku untuk seluruh Palestina dalam LUK 1:5
     -Ini berlaku untuk wilayah timur Sungai Yordan dalam MAT 19:1; Mrk 10:1; Lukas 23:5
-2. Hutan belantara
     -Disebut Beth-arabah JOS 15:6,61
     -Ditugaskan kepada Benyamin JOS 18:22
     -Yohanes Pembaptis berkhotbah dalam MAT 3:1; Lukas 3:3

subject: LOT
entry:
-1. Feast of
     -See PURIM
-2. The son of Haran
     -Accompanies Terah from Ur of the Chaldees to Haran GEN 11:31
     -Migrates with Abraham to the land of Canaan GEN 12:4
     -Accompanies Abraham to Egypt
     -Returns with him to Beth-el GEN 13:1-3
     -Rich in flocks, and herds, and servants
     -Separates from Abraham, and locates in Sodom GEN 13:5-14
     -Taken captive by Chedorlaomer; rescued by Abraham GEN 14:1-16
     -Providentially saved from destruction in Sodom GEN 19; LUK 17:28,29
     -Disobediently protests against going to the mountains, and chooses Zoar GEN 19:17-22
     -His wife disobediently yearns after Sodom, and becomes a pillar of salt GEN 19:26; LUK 17:32
     -Commits incest with his daughters GEN 19:30-38
     -Descendants of
     -See AMMONITES
     -See MOABITES

subject: MARY
entry:
-1. The mother of Jesus MAT 1:16; LUK 1:26-38; 2:5-19
     -Visits her cousin, Elisabeth LUK 1:39-56
     -Attends the feast at Jerusalem with her husband and her son, starts back on the return, misses Jesus, seeks and finds him in the temple area LUK 2:48-51
     -Is present with Jesus at a marriage feast in Cana of Galilee JHN 2:1-10
     -Seeks Jesus when he is teaching in a house MAT 12:46,47; MRK 3:31; LUK 8:19
     -Present at the cross JHN 19:25-27
     -Is committed to the care of John JHN 19:27
     -Lives with the disciples in Jerusalem ACT 1:14
     -Prophecies concerning ISA 7:14; LUK 2:35
-2. Magdalene
     -Possessed of devils, delivered by Jesus MRK 16:9; LUK 8:2,3
     -Present at the crucifixion MAT 27:56; MRK 15:40; JHN 20:1,11-13
     -Recognizes Jesus after the resurrection MAT 28:8-10; MRK 16:9; JHN 20:14-18
-3. Sister of Mary the mother of Jesus, and wife of Cleophas JHN 19:25
     -Mother of James and Joses MAT 27:56; MRK 15:40; JHN 19:25
     -At the gravesite of Jesus MAT 27:61; MRK 15:47
     -Assists in preparing the corpse of Jesus for burial MAT 28:1; MRK 16:1
     -A witness of the resurrection LUK 24:10
-4. Sister of Lazarus
     -Sits at Jesus' feet for instruction LUK 10:38-42
     -Beloved of Jesus JHN 11:1,5
     -Anoints Jesus MAT 26:7-13; MRK 14:3-9; JHN 11:2; 12:3
-5. Mother of Mark and sister of Barnabas ACT 12:12; COL 4:10
-6. A Christian woman in Rome ROM 16:6
